ast.source: The outlaw gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 法外之徒获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second longsword attack, but ignore this trigger for the second attack.
ast.target: 进行第二次长剑攻击，但忽略第二次攻击的此触发条件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ranger gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 游侠获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（简单豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used on two consecutive rounds.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The troubadour gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 吟游诗人获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: he target can now only save against the confusion with a natural 20 (or until the warbanner drops) and can’t flee if the rest of the PCs choose to do so.
ast.target: 目标现在只能通过自然20（或直到战旗倒下）才能对困惑状态进行豁免，并且如果队伍其他成员选择逃跑，它不能逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mooks fighting in the warbanner’s band gain a bonus to their hit points equal to the warbanner’s level (2).
ast.target: 在战旗乐队中战斗的恶棍获得等同于战旗等级（2）的生命值加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unengaged fire bat can move, make a burning contrail attack, and move away from the target as a standard action without taking an opportunity attack from the target.
ast.target: 一只未交战的火蝠可以作为标准动作移动、进行一次燃烧尾迹攻击，然后从目标身边移开，且不会引发目标的借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire bats are agile fliers, especially when riding hot air currents. They slow down a bit away from warmth.
ast.target: 火蝠是敏捷的飞行者，尤其是在乘着热气流时。远离温暖时它们会稍微减速。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，作为标准动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is vulnerable to fire damage (save ends).
ast.target: 目标对火焰伤害易伤（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the fire giant priest-general makes an attack that staggers a target or reduces a target to 0 hp or fewer, each non-mook fire giant in the battle heals 25 hp.
ast.target: 每当火焰巨人祭司将军的攻击使目标陷入蹒跚状态或将目标生命值降至0或更低时，战斗中每个非恶棍的火焰巨人恢复25点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to five times the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火焰巨人的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且无效，火焰巨人反而恢复等同于攻击者等级五倍的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The armor and/or shield is shattered, the target now counts as unarmored with no shield. Magic armors and shields get a save (12 minus the magical AC bonus—so between 11+ for a +1 shield to 7+ for cursed epic +5 armor) to avoid shattering.
ast.target: 护甲和/或盾牌被击碎，目标现在视为无护甲且无盾牌。魔法护甲和盾牌可以进行一次豁免（12减去魔法护甲加值——因此从+1盾牌的11+到被诅咒的史诗级+5护甲的7+）以避免被击碎。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing fire damage, until the end of the day each time they spend a recovery they also take 2d10 fire damage.
ast.target: 一旦目标对持续火焰伤害进行豁免后，直到当天结束，每次他们花费恢复力时，还会受到2d10点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant smith do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to twice the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火焰巨人铁匠的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且无效，火焰巨人铁匠反而恢复等同于攻击者等级两倍的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant warlord adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人督军将升级骰加入其对正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标的攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the warlord can command one nearby ally that has resistance to fire to make a melee attack as a free action.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，督军可以命令一名附近拥有火焰抗性的盟友进行一次近战攻击（作为自由动作）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人将升级骰加入其对正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标的攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, the giant can make a slam attack as a quick action (once per round).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，巨人可以作为快速动作（每轮一次）进行一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused, dazed, hampered, stunned, or weakened.
ast.target: 困惑、眩晕、受阻、震慑或虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a sixth gnashing teeth attack, and is considered undamaged at its new hit point total. Using the hydra’s current hit points as a new baseline, the hydra will be staggered again when it drops below 50% of that total.
ast.target: 当九头蛇第一次陷入蹒跚状态时，作为自由动作，它获得40点生命值和第六次撕咬攻击，并在其新的生命值总数下视为未受损。以九头蛇当前的生命值作为新的基准，当其生命值降至该总数的50%以下时，九头蛇将再次陷入蹒跚状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The second time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a seventh gnashing teeth attack, etc. Use a new hit point baseline as before, but there is no eighth head waiting to sprout.
ast.target: 当九头蛇第二次陷入蹒跚状态时，作为自由动作，它获得40点生命值和第七次撕咬攻击，依此类推。如前所述使用新的生命值基准，但没有第八个头等待长出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a free action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰在本回合已经进行过飞行移动，它可以作为自由动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the *reborn in fire* ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰生命值降至0；请参见下方的*浴火重生*能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a fire attack against the flamebird phoenix fails to beat its resistance, then instead of taking damage the flamebird phoenix heals that amount instead.
ast.target: 如果一次火焰攻击未能超过焰鸟凤凰的抗性，则焰鸟凤凰不会受到伤害，反而会恢复该数量的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A flamewreathed dragon can use primal fire breath 1d4 +2 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 焰缠龙每场战斗可以使用原始火焰吐息1d4+2次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon’s will and magic are so powerful that it ignores the fire resistance of creatures battling it.
ast.target: 巨龙的意志和魔法如此强大，以至于它无视与之战斗的生物的火焰抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑状态（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 幽魂骷髅可以滑翔和悬浮，始终离地七八英尺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target heals using a recovery, but the true-fomori gains the hit points.
ast.target: 目标使用一次恢复力进行治疗，但真正的弗莫里获得该生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori torturer heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，弗莫里拷问者为每个能看到或听到它的弗莫里亚人恢复5点生命值，并且如果至少有一个不洁者能看到或听到它，它也恢复5点生命值。此效果即使弗莫里拷问者已死亡也会影响它，将其从0点生命值恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori sing songs that drive listeners to insanity.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人唱着使听者陷入疯狂的歌曲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ears of all non-fomori creatures in the battle begin to bleed, and continue to do so until the end of the day. Until the next full heal-up, those creatures take a –4 penalty to skill checks involving social situations or detecting sounds.
ast.target: 战斗中所有非弗莫里亚人生物的耳朵开始流血，并持续至当天结束。在下一次完全恢复之前，这些生物在涉及社交情境或侦测声音的技能检定上受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori usually have lots of eyes, or a single prominent eye, and fly by hovering.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人通常有很多眼睛，或一只突出的独眼，并通过悬浮飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature flies, its host’s unwashed and diseased feet hovering inches above the ground.
ast.target: 这种生物飞行，其宿主未清洗且患病的脚悬浮在离地几英寸的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the fomori can fire a powerful *eye beam* from one or more of its eyes.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为快速动作，弗莫里亚人可以从其一只或多只眼睛中发射一道强大的*眼棱*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori shift their forms instinctually, constantly devolving into ever-more horrible creatures.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人本能地变换形态，不断退化成越来越可怕的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the true-fomori is hit by an attack that targets PD or MD, until the start of its next turn, the values of its PD and MD switch and it gains a bonus to AC equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当真正的弗莫里被一次针对强韧防御或意志防御的攻击命中时，直到其下一回合开始，其强韧防御和意志防御的数值互换，并且它获得等同于升级骰的护甲加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After a battle with the fomori, the character with the lowest MD (randomly choose on a tie) has a nightmare during the following night, with a 50% chance that the nightmare somehow comes true the next day.
ast.target: 与弗莫尔人战斗后，MD最低的角色（平局时随机选择）会在接下来的夜晚做噩梦，且有50%的几率在第二天以某种方式成真。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori tend to have lots of legs and can control spiders, scorpions, ticks, and other arachnids.
ast.target: 这些真正的弗莫尔人通常拥有多条腿，并能控制蜘蛛、蝎子、蜱虫及其他蛛形纲生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The true-fomori can climb like a spider and squeeze its body down to scuttle swiftly under low openings.
ast.target: 真正的弗莫尔人能像蜘蛛一样攀爬，并能将身体收缩，以便在低矮的开口下快速穿行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the true-fomori can make a *draining bite* attack to inject acid into its victim and drink its innards.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为快速动作，真正的弗莫尔人可以发动一次*吸血撕咬*攻击，向受害者注入酸液并吸食其内脏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori have plumage or fur in unnatural madness-causing colors.
ast.target: 这些真正的弗莫尔人拥有羽毛或皮毛，呈现出能引发疯狂的非自然色彩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is helpless instead of hampered.
ast.target: 目标处于无助状态而非受阻状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori tyrant heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，弗莫尔暴君每有一个能看到或听到它的弗莫尔人，就能恢复5点生命值；如果至少有一个不洁者能看到或听到它，也能恢复5点生命值。此效果即使弗莫尔人已死亡也生效，可将其从0点生命值恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist is repulsive almost beyond comprehension, but its twisted form grants it the ability to withstand blows. It gains +2 to AC and +1 to PD.
ast.target: 邪教徒的丑陋几乎超乎想象，但其扭曲的形态赋予了它承受打击的能力。它获得+2 AC和+1 PD。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist has a perfect and unaging physical body, a counterpoint to its increasingly corrupted soul. It gains +2 to PD and MD.
ast.target: 邪教徒拥有完美且不朽的肉体，与其日益腐化的灵魂形成鲜明对比。它获得+2 PD和+2 MD。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack hits the unclean-one, sores and pustules on its body burst, and the attacker takes 5 acid damage (champion: 10 damage; epic 15 damage).
ast.target: 当近战攻击命中不洁者时，其身上的疮口和脓包会破裂，攻击者受到5点酸性伤害（冠军：10点伤害；史诗：15点伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The unclean-one cultist can move in strange ways, crawling up walls like a giant bug, skittering along the ground, and so forth. It gains a +2 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 不洁者邪教徒能以奇怪的方式移动，像巨型虫子一样爬墙，在地面上快速移动等等。它在脱离检定中获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the unclean-one heals hit points equal to its level times the escalation die value (@lvl*@ed) at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，不洁者在其回合开始时恢复等于其等级乘以升级骰值（@lvl*@ed）的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once one target has been hit by this attack, no further evil eye attacks can be made by any fomorian this battle.
ast.target: 一旦一个目标被此攻击命中，本次战斗中任何弗莫尔人都不能再进行邪恶之眼攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are at least three other fomorians engaged with the target, the fomorian brute can make the bite attack.
ast.target: 如果目标周围至少有另外三个弗莫尔人与之交战，弗莫尔蛮兵可以发动撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian brute mook counts as two 5th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 弗莫尔蛮兵喽啰在构建战斗时，算作两个5级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fomorian can make one extra melee attack per round as a quick action.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，弗莫尔人每回合可以额外进行一次近战攻击，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian has a cluster of small eyes in the back of its head, a huge eye on a shoulder, a slug-like eye stalk, etc. The fomorian can’t be surprised or ambushed, and it has true sight (spells like blur, invisibility, etc. don’t work on it).
ast.target: 弗莫尔人后脑勺有一簇小眼睛，肩膀上有一只巨眼，还有一根蛞蝓状的眼柄等等。弗莫尔人不会被突袭或伏击，并且拥有真实视觉（模糊术、隐形术等法术对其无效）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack against MD targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当针对MD的攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian is moving, it only takes half damage from attacks—it isn’t really tougher, it just doesn’t notice some wounds.
ast.target: 当弗莫尔人移动时，它只受到攻击的一半伤害——它并非真的更坚韧，只是没有注意到一些伤口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian can make a third attack as a free action.
ast.target: 弗莫尔人可以作为自由动作进行第三次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, if the fomorian is next to a dead body, as a move action it can eat part of the corpse, healing 1d6*10 hp.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，如果弗莫尔人旁边有一具尸体，它可以作为移动动作吃掉尸体的一部分，恢复1d6*10点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian top-cannibal heals from eating a corpse, it gains a bonus to damage with its next attack, hit or miss, equal to the hit points it healed.
ast.target: 当弗莫尔食尸者通过吃尸体恢复生命值时，其下一次攻击（无论命中与否）的伤害获得加值，等于其恢复的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The forge wolf gains +1 to its AC against melee attacks for each other forge wolf engaged with its target (max +4 AC).
ast.target: 锻铁狼在对抗近战攻击时，每有一个其他锻铁狼与其目标交战，其AC获得+1加值（最高+4 AC）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the last mook in a mob of forge wolves dies it deals 2d12 fire damage to anybody engaged with it at the time. Creatures that resist fire damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 每当一群锻铁狼中的最后一个喽啰死亡时，它会对当时与之交战的所有生物造成2d12点火焰伤害。抵抗火焰伤害的生物忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, if a frog knight is unengaged, and an ally is targeted by an attack against AC anywhere on the battlefield, the frog knight may immediately leap to its ally’s side and give that ally a +2 bonus to AC for the rest of the round as an interrupt action.
ast.target: 每回合一次，如果蛙骑士未交战，且战场上有盟友成为针对AC的攻击目标，蛙骑士可以立即跳到盟友身边，并作为中断动作给予该盟友在本轮剩余时间内+2 AC加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You should certainly use one ability per frogspawn, occasionally two. For frogspawn mooks, treat the abilities as usable once per battle.
ast.target: 你当然应该为每个蛙卵使用一个能力，偶尔两个。对于蛙卵喽啰，将这些能力视为每场战斗可使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frogspawn deals @lvl poison damage to any character that pops free of it or successfully disengages from it. (Teleporting away is probably tongue-free unless the GM is hopping mad.)
ast.target: 蛙卵会对任何脱离它或成功从它身上脱离的角色造成@lvl点毒素伤害。（传送离开可能不受舌头影响，除非GM勃然大怒。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, when struck by an attack that targets AC, take half damage from that attack instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当被针对AC的攻击命中时，改为只受到该攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On a natural 16+, a hit from a frog knight’s club inflicts 5 ongoing poison damage (save ends).
ast.target: 在自然16+时，蛙骑士棍棒的命中会施加5点持续毒素伤害（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frogspawn deceivers do not take miss damage.
ast.target: 蛙卵欺骗者不承受未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If it wasn’t killed by the attack, the ally heals 60 hit points and immediately moves as a free action.
ast.target: 如果盟友未被该攻击杀死，则恢复60点生命值并立即作为自由动作移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s next move action is controlled by the old one.
ast.target: 目标的下一次移动动作由古者控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time the target attacks, if it includes the old one in the attack the old one may make a free mindblast attack against the target.
ast.target: 目标下次攻击时，如果攻击包含古者，古者可以对目标进行一次自由的心灵冲击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spellcroaker counts as two spellcroakers for the purposes of the croaking chorus.
ast.target: 此咒语蛙在蛙鸣合唱中算作两个咒语蛙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster counts as two mooks when building battles.
ast.target: 此怪物在构建战斗时算作两个喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses its next move action, and if it’s engaged with the giant, it pops free.
ast.target: 目标失去其下一次移动动作，如果它与巨人交战，则脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant can make a frost touch attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 巨人可以作为自由动作对目标进行一次霜冻之触攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death can cause fluid-filled sacks inside the frost-würm to explode. When the attack roll that kills the frost-würm is a natural even roll, each nearby creature takes 20 cold damage.
ast.target: 死亡可能导致霜冻虫体内充满液体的囊袋爆炸。当杀死霜冻虫的攻击骰为自然偶数时，每个附近的生物受到20点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被卡住，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the fungaloid and its target take 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 菌类体及其目标各受到1d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the escalation die is even, each creeper must succeed on a normal save at the start of its turn or lose its move action that turn.
ast.target: 每当升级骰为偶数时，每个爬行者必须在其回合开始时通过一次普通豁免，否则失去该回合的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drudge can make a fungal attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 苦工本回合可以作为快速动作进行一次菌类攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby fungaloid can make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一个附近的菌类体可以作为自由动作进行一次菌类攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Up to three nearby fungaloids can each make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 最多三个附近的菌类体可以各自作为自由动作进行一次菌类攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The monarch’s attacks deal +1 damage for each other allied creature with the plant type in the battle (max +10).
ast.target: 君主的攻击伤害获得加值，每有一个其他植物类型的盟友生物在战斗中，伤害+1（最高+10）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are not enough nearby fungaloids to use up all the fungal attacks granted by the mycotic scepter, skip the extra fungal attacks but add a full-strength fungaloid drudge to the battle next to the fungaloid monarch.
ast.target: 如果附近没有足够的菌类体来使用菌类权杖授予的所有菌类攻击，则跳过额外的菌类攻击，但在菌类君主旁边向战斗中添加一个满强度的菌类苦工。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 psychic damage and 8 ongoing psychic damage (that feels like a terminal case of guilt).
ast.target: 目标同时受到8点心灵伤害和8点持续心灵伤害（感觉就像一种严重的负罪感）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 30 psychic damage instead.
ast.target: 目标改为受到30点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against a fury devil take a -4 penalty unless the devil is hellbent against that attacker.
ast.target: 除非狂怒魔鬼对该攻击者进入狂怒状态，否则对狂怒魔鬼的攻击受到-4惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a fury devil, the fury devil deals 1d10 extra damage with its next attack this battle, hit or miss.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对狂怒魔鬼的攻击时，无论命中与否，狂怒魔鬼在本次战斗中的下一次攻击将额外造成1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fury devils fly from place to place but fight on their feet.
ast.target: 狂怒魔鬼在不同地点间飞行移动，但战斗时会双脚站立。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle can make two more melee attacks as a free action (but never more than three total attacks per standard action, even if you roll another 11+).
ast.target: 石像鬼可以再进行两次近战攻击作为自由动作（但即使你掷出另一个11+，每次标准动作的总攻击次数也永远不会超过三次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 石像鬼对针对AC的攻击具有12+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Because they often look like statues, gargoyles are capable of springing a surprise on inattentive PCs. When there’s a chance of such an ambush, give the PCs a champion-tier skill check (DC 20) to notice the gargoyles and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 因为它们通常看起来像雕像，石像鬼能够对疏忽的玩家角色发动突袭。当存在此类伏击的可能性时，给予玩家角色一次冠军级技能检定（DC 20）以察觉石像鬼并避免被突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target takes a cumulative –2 penalty to disengage checks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前，脱离检定受到累积-2惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3. The cubahedron spits an engulfed creature into the air above it and makes a shlup’n’schlorp attack against that creature with a +5 attack bonus. Then the creature is engulfed again.
ast.target: 3. 立方体将一个被吞噬的生物吐向其上方的空中，并对该生物进行一次shlup'n'schlorp攻击，攻击加值为+5。然后该生物再次被吞噬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dodecahedron engulfs the target if it's samller than the dodecahedron.
ast.target: 如果目标比十二面体小，十二面体会将其吞噬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is engulfed instead of stuck.
ast.target: 目标被吞噬而非被卡住。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is vulnerable (attacks vs. it have crit range expanded by 2) to attacks by undead until the end of the ghoul’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标在食尸鬼的下一回合结束前，对亡灵生物的攻击处于易伤状态（针对它的攻击重击范围扩大2）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ghoul’s claws and bite attack deals +4 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 食尸鬼的爪击和啃咬攻击对易伤目标额外造成+4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞噬的生物将在次日夜晚变为食尸鬼。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ghoul hits a vulnerable target with a natural even attack roll, the target is also stunned (save ends).
ast.target: 当食尸鬼以自然偶数攻击骰命中易伤目标时，目标同时被震慑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the target saves against the vulnerable effect, it also takes 2d6 ongoing damage each turn.
ast.target: 在目标通过易伤效果的豁免前，它每回合还会受到2d6点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The licklash can make a flesh-seeking tongue attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 舔舐鞭可以对一个不同的目标进行一次寻肉舌攻击作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞噬的生物将在次日夜晚变为食尸鬼。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被眩晕（通过豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d3 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到1d3点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant ant can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨型蚂蚁可以像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant bird of prey must move before making this attack.
ast.target: 巨型猛禽必须先移动才能进行此攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the dire mantis might rate as a huge monster in terms of size, its stats are based on those for a large monster.
ast.target: 虽然巨型螳螂在体型上可能被归类为巨型怪物，但其属性是基于大型怪物的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2d6 ongoing poison damage if it’s dazed or stuck.
ast.target: 如果目标处于眩晕或被卡住状态，它同时受到2d6点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also stuck until the end of the spider’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标同时被卡住，直到蜘蛛的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant web spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨型网蛛可以像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 6d10 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和它的目标都受到6d10点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a giant zombie mook deals triple damage instead of the normal double damage for a crit.
ast.target: 对巨型僵尸喽啰的重击造成三倍伤害，而非正常的重击双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant zombie mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，巨型僵尸喽啰算作两个9级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target must begin making last gasp saves as it is slowly absorbed. Absorbed creatures can’t be resurrected by normal means.
ast.target: 目标必须开始进行最后挣扎豁免，因为它正被缓慢吸收。被吸收的生物无法通过常规手段复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time this battle that the target saves against shocked it is an easy save (6+).
ast.target: 在本次战斗中，目标下一次对电击效果进行豁免时，这是一次简单豁免（6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it only counts a half a normal mook.
ast.target: 在构建包含此怪物的战斗时，它只算作半个普通喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: success indicates a hit; failure is a miss that hits one of the mirror images instead, dealing no miss damage to the glabrezou but dispelling all the images.
ast.target: 成功表示命中；失败表示未命中，但会击中一个镜像，对格拉布雷祖不造成未命中伤害，但会驱散所有镜像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, and can glide over obstacles.
ast.target: 闪光携带者通常悬浮在离地面一两英尺的空中，并且可以滑行越过障碍物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiendfletch can make a disengage check as a free action this turn after the attack.
ast.target: 魔箭手可以在本次攻击后，以自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of its next turn as it suffers debilitating pain from a hellish arrow.
ast.target: 目标因遭受地狱之箭带来的剧烈痛苦而被眩晕，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While making a ranged attack, the fiendfletch gains a +4 bonus to AC against opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 进行远程攻击时，魔箭手在对抗借机攻击时获得+4的AC加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fiendfletch rolls a natural 16+ with a hellbent bow attack and hits, the target is weakened (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当魔箭手使用地狱弓攻击掷出自然16+并命中时，目标被虚弱（通过豁免结束）而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gnoll can make a second longbow attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 豺狼人可以再进行一次长弓攻击（仅限一次）作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If more than one gnoll is engaged with the target, each gnoll melee attack that misses that target deals half damage.
ast.target: 如果有多于一个豺狼人与目标交战，每个豺狼人对该目标的近战攻击未命中时，造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by gnoll rangers expands by 2 against humanoids.
ast.target: 豺狼人游侠对类人生物的攻击重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is marked for death; until the end of the battle, all gnoll attacks against the target gain an attack bonus equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 目标被标记为死亡目标；在战斗结束前，所有豺狼人对该目标的攻击获得等于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The goblin bat mage pops free from the target and can move as a free action.
ast.target: 哥布林蝙蝠法师从目标身上弹开，并可以作为自由动作移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If target is staggered after taking the damage, it’s also hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标在受到伤害后进入蹒跚状态，它同时被阻碍，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One random nearby ally of the target takes 2d6 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 目标的一个随机附近盟友受到2d6点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a ranged attack targets this creature while it’s flying, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当此生物在飞行时成为远程攻击的目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the goblin bat mage is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 15 damage.
ast.target: 当哥布林蝙蝠法师进入蹒跚状态时，它必须进行一次即时豁免。失败时，它失去飞行能力，直到其下一回合结束。如果在靠近地面处飞行，它会立即着陆。如果在远离地面处飞行，它会重重摔落并受到15点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 地精在脱离检定中获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins only need to roll a 6+ to disengage.
ast.target: 地精只需掷出6+即可成功脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an ally of the necromancer dies it instead heals to full hp and its creature type becomes UNDEAD if it was not already.
ast.target: 当死灵法师的盟友死亡时，它会恢复至满生命值，且其生物类型变为亡灵（如果原本不是的话）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the necromancer starts the combat as a living HUMANOID, then when it dies instead its type becomes UNDEAD and it instantly heals to 226 hp.
ast.target: 如果死灵法师在战斗开始时是活着的类人生物，那么当它死亡时，其类型会变为亡灵，并立即恢复至226点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its dazzling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 巨龙重新获得其炫目吐息的使用能力（如果已消耗），并可在其下一回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes no damage and is instead swallowed whole (see below).
ast.target: 目标不受伤害，而是被整个吞下（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gorge dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 峡谷巨龙善于游泳，且能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to the grandmother’s type of special damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前对祖母的特殊伤害类型变得脆弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains different abilities based on which name it has taken.
ast.target: 此生物根据其采用的名称获得不同的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature attacks grandmother, it takes 1d6*10 damage of the grandmother’s special type on a hit, or 1d3*5 damage of that type on a miss.
ast.target: 当一个生物攻击祖母时，若命中，它将受到祖母特殊类型1d6*10点伤害；若未命中，则受到该类型1d3*5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gray hoarder has resist negative energy 16+, as well as a +2 bonus to defenses and saves against attacks and effects that specifically target undead.
ast.target: 灰色囤积者对负能量有16+的抗性，并且在防御和对抗专门针对亡灵的攻击和效果的豁免检定中获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the great cat moves before making this attack, it takes a –1 penalty to the attack roll but gains a +4 bonus to the damage.
ast.target: 如果巨猫在发动此攻击前移动，其攻击检定受到-1减值，但伤害获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the great cat can jump across the battlefield as a move action, avoiding obstacles and dangers. It can’t be intercepted when leaping.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，巨猫可以使用一个移动动作在战场上跳跃，避开障碍和危险。跳跃时无法被拦截。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action when the escalation die is even, the great cat can make an *unnerving roar* attack.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，巨猫可以使用一个快速动作发动*令人不安的咆哮*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cadre can make a second double axe attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 核心成员可以使用一个自由动作进行第二次双斧攻击（仅限一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack targets PD instead of AC.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by great fang cadre orcs expands by 3 until half the great fang cadre mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 在巨牙核心成员兽人被消灭一半之前，其近战攻击的重击范围扩大3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为偶数，则再进行一次撕扯啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck and can’t make ranged attacks (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被定身且无法进行远程攻击（通过豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Add a dire feature. Roll a d6.

1: Armor plates

2: Spiky bits

3: Carnage

4: Poison

5: Dire regeneration

6: Fury
ast.target:
添加一个凶暴特性。掷一个d6。

1： 装甲板

2： 尖刺

3： 屠戮

4： 毒素

5： 凶暴再生

6： 狂怒

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add +2 to the dire animal’s AC, and add +1 to its PD.
ast.target: 为凶暴动物的AC增加+2，并为其PD增加+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound’s attacks that miss deal 5 damage. When staggered, its missed attacks deal 10 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬未命中的攻击造成5点伤害。当其陷入蹒跚状态时，其未命中的攻击造成10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 凶猛撕咬还造成10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the hound heals 15 hp.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，猎犬恢复15点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the hound gains a +2 attack bonus and deals +4 damage, but at the end of each of its turns it takes 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 当处于蹒跚状态时，猎犬获得+2攻击加值并造成+4伤害，但在其每回合结束时受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 60 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值降至60点或以下时，它会因恐惧而陷入眩晕状态，且其攻击不加入升级骰（通过所有豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sunder wraiths fly like the world is defined however they want it to be defined.
ast.target: 裂魂者飞行时，仿佛世界可以随心所欲地被定义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Three times per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a hard save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗三次，当裂魂者穿过固体物体（如墙壁、王座、门或箱子）时，该物体必须进行一次困难豁免。如果豁免失败，该物体被破坏。强大的魔法物品在豁免中获得加值，但倾向于失败。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a bite attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 使用一个自由动作对目标发动一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action the xorn can swim through the ground, or through a wall.
ast.target: 土巨怪可以使用一个移动动作在地面或墙壁中游泳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say “nearby”.
ast.target: 土巨怪可以看穿各种类型的岩石和土壤一定距离，姑且称之为“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Xorn are used to the fires of the deep and the cold of solid rock—when a cold or fire attack targets a xorn, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 土巨怪习惯了深地的火焰和固体岩石的寒冷——当寒冷或火焰攻击以土巨怪为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a quick action (once per round), the xorn can heal 20 hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为快速动作（每回合一次），土巨怪可以恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn’s attacks deal half damage on a miss.
ast.target: 土巨怪未命中的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the xorn attacks immediately after swimming out from rock, it can deal double damage on a hit.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当土巨怪从岩石中游出后立即发动攻击时，若命中，可造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 12 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标因翼击受到12点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标因爪击受到20点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a treasury master attack as a free action
ast.target: 巨龙可以使用一个自由动作发动宝库主宰攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the dragon is in his lair, it has +1 to AC.
ast.target: 如果巨龙在其巢穴中，其AC获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A greathoard elder can use precise breath 1d4 +1 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨宝长老每场战斗可以使用精确吐息1d4 +1次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon is enamored/envious of the icons with the greatest hoards. For each PC who has at least one positive or conflicted relationship point with one or more of those icons, the greathoard elder gains an extra use of treasury master this battle.
ast.target: 巨龙迷恋/嫉妒拥有最大宝库的圣徽。对于每位与这些圣徽中的一个或多个至少有一个正面或矛盾关系点的玩家角色，巨宝长老在本场战斗中获得一次额外的宝库主宰使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The green bulette gains a +3 bonus to attack and damage with its first attack each battle.
ast.target:
绿色土龙在每场战斗的第一次攻击中获得+3攻击和伤害加值。"},{"i":733,"t":"

每场战斗两次，作为快速动作（每回合一次），土巨怪可以恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die but can’t use into the earth. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 当战场上至少有一个生物处于蹒跚或昏迷状态时，土龙的攻击和伤害获得等于升级骰的加值，但无法使用遁地。没有血液的生物（构装体、软泥怪、植物生物等）不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Like all bulettes, the green bulette can burrow. While above ground, it prefers to move slowly on the surface and rely on its plant- and soil-covered shell to stay hidden until it attacks.
ast.target: 像所有土龙一样，绿色土龙可以掘地。在地面以上时，它更喜欢在地表缓慢移动，并依靠其覆盖着植物和土壤的外壳保持隐藏，直到发动攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to poison damage until the end of the battle. Creatures that resist poison damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前对毒素伤害变得脆弱。抵抗毒素伤害的生物忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses all its resistances and is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标失去所有抗性，并在下一回合结束前陷入虚弱状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, but missing with the attack doesn’t expend it.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，但攻击未命中不会消耗此次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for this attack expands by 1 (to a maximum of 16+).
ast.target: 此攻击的重击范围扩大1（最大为16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d6 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙形生物若近战攻击未命中，将对目标造成2d6点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ongoing poison damage increases by 2.
ast.target: 持续性毒素伤害增加2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入虚弱状态（通过豁免终止两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is partially blinded and takes a –2 penalty to attacks and defenses until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标陷入部分失明状态，攻击和防御受到-2减值，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 72 hp.
ast.target: 直至其下一回合结束，目标将受到掠食者*恐惧光环*的影响，即使其生命值超过72点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 6+, all normal saves made during the battle become hard saves (16+).
ast.target: 当升级骰为6+时，战斗中进行的所有普通豁免都将变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reavers ignore the bonds of gravity while they’re phasing.
ast.target: 掠食者在相位移动时无视重力束缚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature disengages or moves away from a reaver that’s phasing, that creature is vulnerable to negative energy until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当生物脱离或远离正在相位移动的掠食者时，该生物将受到负能量易伤，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 3d10 negative energy damage to any creature that targets the gruesome reaver with an attack that deals holy damage.
ast.target: 对任何以神圣伤害攻击恐怖掠食者的生物造成3d10点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers one hag ability as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫以一个自由动作触发一项女巫能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers two hag abilities as a free action (can’t be the same ability twice).
ast.target: 女巫以一个自由动作触发两项女巫能力（不能是同一项能力）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each hag can lay a curse upon the one who ends its horrible life. After dropping to 0 hit points, a hag always lingers long enough to pronounce the words of the curse. (See Death Curses.)
ast.target: 每个女巫都能对终结其可怕生命之人施加诅咒。生命值降至0后，女巫总会拖延足够时间以念出诅咒之言。（见死亡诅咒。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target starts making last gasp saves. On the fourth failure, it becomes a shapeless ooze.
ast.target: 目标开始进行临终喘息豁免。第四次失败后，它将变为无形软泥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a psychic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当灵能攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby lower-level mook makes an attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的低等级仆从以一个自由动作进行一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a nearby ally of the half-orc commander scores a critical hit, that ally can roll a save against a save ends effect as a free action.
ast.target: 当半兽人指挥官的附近盟友造成重击时，该盟友可以以一个自由动作进行一次豁免，以对抗一个“通过豁免终止”的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 部落勇士恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, a tribal champion can roll two  for each melee attack roll it makes and use the result it prefers. If both dice are 11+, the melee attack is a critical hit.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，部落勇士可以为每次近战攻击骰掷两次骰子，并选择其偏好的结果。如果两次骰子结果均为11+，则该近战攻击为重击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only when the hallowed gargoyle starts its turn flying and ends its turn engaged on the ground.
ast.target: 仅当圣化石像鬼回合开始时处于飞行状态，且回合结束时处于地面交战状态时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby ally can roll a save against a save ends effect. If no allies are affected by a save ends effect, one nearby ally can make a basic attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近盟友可以进行一次豁免，以对抗一个“通过豁免终止”的效果。如果没有盟友受到“通过豁免终止”效果影响，则一名附近盟友可以以一个自由动作进行一次基础攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（通过豁免终止）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hallowed gargoyle is hit by an attack against MD, reroll the attack with a -2 attack penalty. (Sometimes the halo sputters, so if you forget to use it the first time, use the reroll later in the battle.)
ast.target: 圣化石像鬼首次被针对MD的攻击命中时，以-2攻击减值重骰该攻击。（有时光环会闪烁，因此如果你第一次忘记使用它，可以在战斗后期使用重骰。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hallowed gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 圣化石像鬼对针对AC的攻击具有12+伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（简易豁免终止，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱状态而非受阻状态（简易豁免终止，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and the target take 3d10 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸和目标均受到3d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a headless zombie drops to 0 hp, it flails with its fists and makes a mouthless cry attack as a free action before it dies.
ast.target: 当无头僵尸生命值降至0时，它会在死亡前以自由动作挥舞拳头并发动一次无声嚎叫攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature tries to affect the zombie’s attack, such as forcing a reroll or applying a penalty, it must roll a normal save; on a failure, the effect is negated.
ast.target: 当生物试图影响僵尸的攻击时，例如强制重骰或施加减值，它必须进行一次普通豁免；失败则该效果被抵消。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While nearby a headless zombie, when a creature would heal, it only heals half the normal hit points.
ast.target: 在无头僵尸附近时，当生物将要恢复生命值时，它只恢复正常生命值的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die increases to 6, each headless zombie in the battle is restored to maximum hit points, including the dead ones.
ast.target: 当升级骰增加至6时，战斗中的每个无头僵尸（包括已死亡的）都将恢复至最大生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choos to add the escalation die to an attack against a hell imp, the imp automatically hits with it next needign taunt attack this battle, and the target taes 2d6 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对地狱小鬼的攻击时，该小鬼在本场战斗中的下一次必要嘲讽攻击将自动命中，且目标受到2d6点额外心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hell imps are capable of impressive feats of aerial agility, but only when teir lives depends on it.
ast.target: 地狱小鬼能够做出令人印象深刻的空中敏捷动作，但仅当它们的生命受到威胁时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stinging tail attack deals 3 extra ongoing poison damage (11 total), but the target must succeed on two saves (one for ongoing and one for weakened).
ast.target: 刺尾攻击造成3点额外持续性毒素伤害（总计11点），但目标必须通过两次豁免（一次针对持续伤害，一次针对虚弱）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellcat must have its move action available to use *blazing pounce*.
ast.target: 地狱猫必须拥有可用的移动动作才能使用*烈焰猛扑*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hellcat, during its next turn it gains a cumulative +2 bonus to attack if it’s invisible. Otherwise, it gains a non-cumulative +2 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn as its form blurs.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对地狱猫的攻击时，在其下一回合中，如果它处于隐形状态，则获得累积+2攻击加值。否则，其形态模糊，获得非累积+2防御加值，持续至其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in bright light, the hellcat is invisible; attacks against it have a 50% miss chance.
ast.target: 在明亮光线下，地狱猫处于隐形状态；针对它的攻击有50%的失手几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hellcat takes only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 地狱猫只受到借机攻击一半的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellhound can make a fiery breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱犬可以以一个自由动作进行一次烈焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a hell hound at the start of its turn takes 2d6 fire damage.
ast.target: 在地狱犬回合开始时，与其交战的每个生物受到2d6点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the hellstone gargoyle misses with a melee attack, *weathered claws* deals an additional 1d6 psychic damage until the end of the battle (maximum 4d6).
ast.target: 每当地狱石像鬼近战攻击未命中时，*风化利爪*将造成额外1d6点心灵伤害，持续至战斗结束（最多4d6）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellstone gargoyle can't fly per se, but a clumsy glide can be achieved.
ast.target: 地狱石像鬼本身无法飞行，但可以进行笨拙的滑翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When there's the chance of an ambush, give the PC's a hard champion-tier skill check (usually DC 25) to notice the gargoyle and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 当存在伏击可能性时，给予PC一次困难的勇士级技能检定（通常DC 25）以察觉石像鬼并避免被突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped can make one aberrant attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱扭曲者可以以一个自由动作进行一次异怪攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped gains a cumulative +1 attack bonus to its claw attacks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 地狱扭曲者的利爪攻击获得累积+1攻击加值，持续至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For its mutated form ability, choose one instead of rolling.
ast.target: 对于其变异形态能力，选择一项而非掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 5 ongoing acid damage (easy save ends, 6+), and the hellwasp can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 5点持续性酸液伤害（简易豁免终止，6+），且地狱黄蜂可以从目标身上弹开。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 1. 混乱；2. 虚弱；3. 晕眩；4. 易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hellwasps are adroit fliers that can hover and even fly backward.
ast.target: 地狱黄蜂是灵巧的飞行者，能够悬停甚至向后飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The save versus the stinger’s ongoing acid damage is a normal save (11+) instead of an easy save.
ast.target: 对抗毒刺持续酸性伤害的豁免检定是普通豁免（11+），而非简易豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hezrou’s allies gain a +4 attack bonus against any creature it is grabbing.
ast.target: 赫兹罗的盟友对任何它正在抓取的生物获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant deals double damage with its attacks against staggered targets.
ast.target: 巨人对踉跄目标的攻击造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn as a stone hand rises from the ground to grasp it.
ast.target: 目标被束缚，直到其下一回合结束，期间一只石手从地面升起抓住它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes the penalty to attacks.
ast.target: 目标同时受到攻击惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nymphs are tied to an area of land or water. Land areas will be at most a couple miles wide; water areas might be much larger. As a rule, nymphs can’t leave the area they’re bound to.
ast.target: 宁芙与一片土地或水域绑定。陆地区域最宽不过几英里；水域区域可能大得多。通常，宁芙无法离开它们所绑定的区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck under a pile of treasure until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被埋在一堆财宝下，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 15 extra damage from a precise strike.
ast.target: 目标因一次精准打击受到15点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the start of its next turn, the first time an attack would hit the hobgoblin captain, it can partially avoid that attack if it has a nearby goblin ally. It only takes half damage from the attack, and that ally takes the rest.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合开始，第一次攻击可能命中地精队长时，如果它附近有一个地精盟友，它可以部分躲避该攻击。它只受到该攻击一半的伤害，盟友承受剩余部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ignore all damage from a hit (but not a crit) against AC.
ast.target: 忽略一次命中（但非重击）对AC造成的所有伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标同时被眩晕（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The honey devil can make a disengage check this turn as a free action.
ast.target: 蜜魔可以在本回合以一个自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the honey devil is staggered by an attack, it makes a confusing plea attack against the attacker as a free action after the attack.
ast.target: 当蜜魔因一次攻击而踉跄时，它可以在攻击后以一个自由动作对攻击者进行一次迷惑恳求攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 在使用此怪物构建战斗时，它只算作半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a telepathic harry attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是魔鬼在本回合的第一次攻击，它可以在本回合以一个自由动作进行一次心灵骚扰攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a crushing punch or kick attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是魔鬼在本回合的第一次攻击，它可以在本回合以一个自由动作进行一次粉碎拳击或踢击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hooded devil, it adds the escalation die to its attacks until the end of the battle and no other attacks against it can use the escalation die.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对兜帽魔鬼的攻击时，它会将升级骰加入其攻击，直到战斗结束，且其他攻击无法再对它使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of a hooded devil’s turn, it can roll a save against each save ends effect affecting it if it doesn’t attack that turn (so it could successfully save against confused or stunned conditions and still move that turn, for example.)
ast.target: 在兜帽魔鬼的回合开始时，如果它在本回合不进行攻击，它可以对影响它的每个“豁免结束”效果进行一次豁免检定（例如，它可以成功豁免困惑或震慑状态，并在本回合仍然移动）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned azinth adult can make a trample attack as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 有角阿辛斯成年体可以在本回合以一个快速动作进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth adult have a 30% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before an attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯成年体的攻击有30%的失手几率。攻击者必须在攻击骰之前掷失手几率。此外，当阿辛斯静止站立或缓慢吃草时，它几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the miss chance from the azinth’s natural blurring by 5*@ed.
ast.target: 将阿辛斯自然模糊的失手几率提高5*@ed。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time this battle the azinth is staggered, it becomes harder to detect until the end of the battle, gaining a +4 bonus to all defenses.
ast.target: 本次战斗中阿辛斯第一次踉跄时，它变得更难被察觉，直到战斗结束，所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth calf have a 20% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before the attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯幼崽的攻击有20%的失手几率。攻击者必须在攻击骰之前掷失手几率。此外，当阿辛斯静止站立或缓慢吃草时，它几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each horned azinth adult gains a +1 attack bonus during a battle that includes one or more calves, +2 if any calves are attacked, and +4 if any calves are killed!
ast.target: 在包含一只或多只幼崽的战斗中，每只有角阿辛斯成年体获得+1攻击加值；如果有任何幼崽被攻击，则为+2；如果有任何幼崽被杀死，则为+4！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 有角魔鬼可以对一个不同的目标以一个自由动作进行一次切割尾击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack as a free action.
ast.target: 有角魔鬼可以以一个自由动作进行一次切割尾击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 30 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到30点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a horned devil, you are weakened until the end of your next turn after you make the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对有角魔鬼的攻击时，在你进行攻击后，你将被削弱，直到你的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Horned devils are clumsy but determined fliers.
ast.target: 有角魔鬼是笨拙但坚定的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到15点持续酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge black dragon can use acid breath 2d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型黑龙每场战斗可使用酸息2d3次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 黑龙擅长游泳，可以在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸性攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends). After the target saves, it takes a -1 attack penalty (non-cumulative) until its next full heal-up (because it’s vibrating slightly out of synch with the rest of the world).
ast.target: 目标同时被眩晕（豁免结束）。目标豁免后，直到其下一次完全恢复，它受到-1攻击惩罚（不可累积）（因为它轻微振动，与世界其他部分不同步）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge blue dragon can use far slashing lightning breath 2d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型蓝龙每场战斗可使用远程斩击闪电吐息2d4次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: impossible unless the dragon has a save bonus from some other source).
ast.target: 除非龙有来自其他来源的豁免加值，否则不可能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a mind-bending babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次精神错乱呓语攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused instead of dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被困惑而非眩晕（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can pop free from the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature attacks the dragon, if it used another action this turn before the attack, the dragon gains a +4 bonus to all defenses against the attack.
ast.target: 当一个生物攻击龙时，如果它在攻击前本回合使用了另一个动作，龙对该攻击的所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make an acrid smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次刺鼻烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon’s MD, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以龙的MD为目标时，它可以以一个自由动作强制攻击者重骰该攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a stultifying smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次令人昏沉的烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 40 ongoing fire damage and is dazed (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标受到40点持续火焰伤害并被眩晕（两者均需豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can heal 300 hp and cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can heal and cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在其回合开始时，龙可以以一个自由动作恢复300点生命值，并取消其身上所有效果和状态，包括持续伤害。即使它被阻止采取动作（例如被震慑），它也可以恢复并取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a poison breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次毒息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到20点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fourth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第四次尖牙、利爪和尾巴攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fifth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第五次尖牙、利爪和尾巴攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge red dragon can use fiery breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型红龙每场战斗可使用烈焰吐息1d6次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 18+ against that attack. If the attack misses, the dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以龙为目标时，它可以以一个自由动作强制攻击者重骰该攻击，并对该攻击具有18+伤害抗性。如果攻击未命中，龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The white dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 白龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The thug deals +6 damage with its next attack this battle.
ast.target: 暴徒在本场战斗中的下一次攻击造成+6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d6 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和它的目标都受到1d6点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当踉跄时

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is taking ongoing psychic damage, the attack deals +2d6 damage.
ast.target: 如果目标正在承受持续心灵伤害，该攻击额外造成+2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 当目标正在承受持续心灵伤害时，它被眩晕（-4攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当目标正在承受持续心灵伤害时，它被困惑而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hungry stars flap and glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 饥饿之星拍打、滑翔和悬停，始终离地七八英尺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d8 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到1d8点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can turn its own failed disengage check into a success by taking 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛可以通过承受1d4点伤害，将自己失败的脱离检定转变为成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛可以像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action, one of the ice devil’s nearby allies of its level or lower can make a basic attack as the ice devil sets the battlefield. That attack only deals half damage.
ast.target: 作为一个自由动作，冰魔的一个等级等于或低于它的附近盟友可以在冰魔布置战场时进行一次基础攻击。该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against an ice devil, you are stuck (save ends).
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对冰魔的攻击时，你被束缚（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lower level nearby ally of the ice devil attacks a creature that’s stuck, the crit range of that attack expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当冰魔的一个较低等级的附近盟友攻击一个被束缚的生物时，该攻击的重击范围扩大升级骰的数值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorceress can make an icy delusions attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫可以以一个自由动作对目标进行一次冰冷幻觉攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused (hard save ends, 16+); OR stunned (save ends). After saving, the creature rerolls its initiative.
ast.target: 困惑（困难豁免结束，16+）；或震慑（豁免结束）。豁免后，该生物重骰其先攻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ice sorceress has resist damage 16+ unless the attack deals fire damage.
ast.target: 冰女巫具有16+伤害抗性，除非攻击造成火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a spell attack misses the chimera, it has no miss effect and the chimera heals 40 hp.
ast.target: 当一次法术攻击未命中奇美拉时，它没有未命中效果，且奇美拉恢复40点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的近战攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera saves against a condition, it becomes immune to that condition until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当奇美拉成功豁免一个状态时，它对该状态免疫，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of spell attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的法术攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the chimera at the start of its turn, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在奇美拉的回合开始时与其交战，它受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the chimera scores a critical hit, it takes a cumulative -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 每次奇美拉造成重击时，它受到累积-2的所有防御惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any damage dice that roll maximum damage against the chimera count as 1s.
ast.target: 任何对奇美拉掷出最大伤害的伤害骰视为1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera won’t willingly disengage from a creature engaged with it.
ast.target: 奇美拉不会自愿脱离与它交战的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the chimera gains an additional standard action that turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，奇美拉在该回合获得一个额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera’s form is unusually frail, and any damage dice that roll 1s against the chimera count as 2s.
ast.target: 奇美拉的形态异常脆弱，任何对奇美拉掷出1的伤害骰视为2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera makes a fiery breath attack, it can make another fiery breath attack that turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 当奇美拉进行一次烈焰吐息攻击时，它可以在该回合以一个快速动作再进行一次烈焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural odd miss with fiery breath, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉用烈焰吐息掷出自然奇数未命中时，它受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of poison attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的毒素攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of holy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的神圣攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the chimera can make a tusk charge attack. It can’t make any other attacks the same turn.
ast.target: 作为一个标准动作，奇美拉可以进行一次獠牙冲锋攻击。它在同一回合不能进行任何其他攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horns and tusks of the chimera lock together at inopportune moments. When it rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack against multiple targets, it loses any further attacks that turn.
ast.target: 奇美拉的角和獠牙会在不合时宜的时刻卡住。当它对多个目标的攻击掷出自然1-5时，它失去该回合的任何后续攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera can fly like an eagle, swooping in and out of the battle.
ast.target: 奇美拉可以像鹰一样飞行，在战斗中俯冲进出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of negative energy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的负能量攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack and misses, the target takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉以攻击骰出自然1-5且未命中时，目标受到20点持续性毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each turn the chimera hits with an attack, it rerolls the attack and takes the lower roll.
ast.target: 奇美拉每回合首次命中攻击时，可重骰该次攻击并取较低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the chimera rolls 2d20 with its melee attacks and uses the higher roll.
ast.target: 当奇美拉未处于踉跄状态时，其近战攻击掷2d20并取较高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the target is weakened instead of dazed; OR the imp can make a blight jet attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 目标将陷入虚弱而非眩晕；或者，小恶魔可以对另一个目标发动枯萎喷射攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature attacks the imp and rolls a natural 1-5, that creature takes 1d10 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每当有生物攻击小恶魔并掷出自然1-5时，该生物受到1d10点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An intellect assassin’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智力刺客对MD的攻击重击范围扩大2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can't add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends)
ast.target: 目标无法将升级骰加入其攻击（持续至豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intellect devourer’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智力吞噬者对MD的攻击重击范围扩大2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Increased trauma: Add the following extra effect trigger to the intellect devourer’s recall trauma attack.

Natural 5, 10, 15, 20: The target can’t cast spells until the end of its next turn.
ast.target:
创伤加剧：在智力吞噬者的回忆创伤攻击中增加以下额外效果触发条件。

自然5、10、15、20：目标在下个回合结束前无法施放法术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With a resounding “WHANG!”, the shovel leaves the target dazed until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 随着一声响亮的“铛！”，铲子使目标眩晕至其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a jackal gravewrecker mook rolls a natural 1 with an attack, its cowardly nature takes over and it flees, leaving the rest of its mob to fight on.
ast.target: 当豺狼掘墓者小兵以攻击骰出自然1时，其怯懦本性占据上风，它会逃离战场，留下其余同伙继续战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mage can make a second attack against the same target as a free action.
ast.target: 法师可以对同一目标发动第二次攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 negative energy damage
ast.target: 目标受到5点负能量伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The high priest can make a *cull the weak* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 高阶祭司可以发动*剔除弱者*攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 72 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当目标与此生物交战时，若其生命值为72点或更低，则其陷入眩晕（攻击-4）且无法将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, as the jackal mage uses its psychic connection with the Fallen Icon to show an image of the moment of death (always past, not future) of someone the target loved or someone they let down.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，豺狼法师利用其与堕落圣像的心灵连接，向目标展示其挚爱或辜负之人死亡瞬间的景象（总是过去，而非未来）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage
ast.target: 目标同时受到5点持续性伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到10点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it counts as 1.5 of a monster at 7th level.
ast.target: 在构建包含此怪物的战斗时，它在7级时按1.5个怪物计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the jackal priest drops to 0 hp, she can use summon ghouls as a free action.
ast.target: 当豺狼祭司生命值降至0时，她可以发动召唤食尸鬼，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scout can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 侦察兵本回合可以执行一次额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground. It also performs barrel rolls.
ast.target: 怨灵骷髅可以滑翔和悬浮，始终离地七八英尺。它还会进行桶滚飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jotun auroch can make a fiery or frosty breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 约顿奥罗奇可以发动火焰或寒霜吐息攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷或火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然18+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the kelpling reaches 0 hp, it doesn’t die. Instead, it separates into 1d3 +1 constituent symbionts, known as kelplets.
ast.target: 当凯普林生命值降至0时，它不会死亡。相反，它会分裂成1d3+1个被称为凯普莱特的共生体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会从未命中攻击中受到伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When one of the kobold’s allies engages a creature engaged with the kobold, the kobold can pop free as a free action.
ast.target: 当狗头人的某个盟友与和狗头人交战的生物交战时，狗头人可以自由脱离，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This kobold berserker mook transforms into an undamaged *really angry kobold* after the attack.
ast.target: 此狗头人狂战士小兵在攻击后会变身为未受损的*暴怒狗头人*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll 2d20 for each of the kobold’s attacks and use the higher result.
ast.target: 为狗头人的每次攻击掷2d20，并取较高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold pushes or trips the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标推入或绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is line tied to the barbed dart, pulling/tripping the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 倒刺飞镖上系有绳索，可将目标拉入或绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The steed can’t be targeted separately from the kobold. If the kobold dies the dog runs away.
ast.target: 坐骑无法被单独选为目标。若狗头人死亡，狗会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到8点持续性酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dragon-soul’s wings aren’t strong enough for sustained flapping flight, but with a headwind and a tall place to launch from it can glide for hours. During battle, however, it must land at the end of its turn if the escalation die is even (but see fire spit).
ast.target: 龙魂的翅膀不足以支持持续的振翅飞行，但借助上升气流和高处起点，它可以滑翔数小时。然而在战斗中，若升级骰为偶数，它必须在回合结束时落地（但火焰喷射除外）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold drags the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标拖入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold summons a trap that was not previously there, which the target triggers. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人召唤一个先前不存在的陷阱，目标触发了该陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The engineer’s kobold allies gain a +2 attack bonus against the target until the start of the engineer’s next turn.
ast.target: 工程师的狗头人盟友获得对目标的+2攻击加值，持续至工程师下个回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blast knocks the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 爆炸将目标炸入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each other glinter in the battle gains a +1 attack bonus (cumulative) until the end of the turn.
ast.target: 战斗中的其他每个闪光者获得+1攻击加值（累积），持续至回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mob of glinters can use this attack only once during the battle. On the turn that they use the attack, each glinter in the mob can choose whether to make the attack or not. Any who don’t use it, lose it.
ast.target: 闪光者群在整场战斗中只能使用此攻击一次。在使用此攻击的回合，群中的每个闪光者可以选择是否发动攻击。未使用者将失去机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever three or more glinters drop from a single attack (possibly involving multiple attack rolls), one-third of those glinters are undamaged instead (round down).
ast.target: 每当三个或更多闪光者因单次攻击（可能涉及多次攻击骰）而倒下时，其中三分之一的闪光者未受损（向下取整）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a glinter mob is reduced to half its number or less, the surviving glinters gain a +4 bonus to all defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当闪光者群数量减半或更少时，幸存的闪光者所有防御获得+4加值，持续至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A kobold shadow-warrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狗头人暗影战士可以像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会从未命中攻击中受到伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold warrior can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 狗头人战士可以从目标处自由脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobold warriors with single digit hit points will run away the first chance they get.
ast.target: 生命值为个位数的狗头人战士会在第一时间逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When staggered, the kohwa enforcer gains a bonus to damage equal to triple the escalation die (3*@ed).
ast.target: 当被击退时，kohwa执法者获得伤害加值，其数值等于升级骰的三倍（3*@ed）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are winged, and therefore capable of flight. While they are strong fliers and able to travel great distances in this way, they are acutely aware of how ungainly they look while doing so, and therefore prefer to walk or run unless they are certain no one is watching.
ast.target: Kohwa拥有翅膀，因此能够飞行。虽然它们是优秀的飞行者，能够借此长途跋涉，但它们也敏锐地意识到自己飞行时的样子有多么笨拙，因此除非确信无人旁观，否则它们更喜欢步行或奔跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are capable of short-range telepathy with non-kohwa. It is assumed (although no one is entirely sure) that they are capable of communicating with others of their species at greater distances, as when one is in trouble, others are sure to appear—eventually.
ast.target: Kohwa能够与非kohwa进行短距离心灵感应。据推测（尽管无人完全确定），它们能够与同类进行更远距离的交流，因为当一只kohwa陷入困境时，其他同类最终一定会出现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the kohwa messenger makes a natural odd roll when using this attack, it can immediately make another *piercing gaze* attack roll against a different target it has not already targeted this turn.
ast.target: 每当kohwa信使在使用此攻击时掷出自然奇数骰，它可以立即对本轮尚未攻击过的不同目标进行一次*穿刺凝视*攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used until the escalation die reaches 4+
ast.target: 升级骰达到4+之前无法使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller makes a second *thrashing tail* attack against a different target.
ast.target: koruku陆行杀手对不同目标进行第二次*猛击尾扫*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller regains its *stolen magic* attack if it’s expended.
ast.target: 如果*窃取魔法*攻击已使用，koruku陆行杀手可以重新获得它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby koruku servitor can make a *wild magic blast* attack (fire damage) as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的koruku仆从可以作为自由动作进行一次*狂野魔法冲击*攻击（火焰伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 attack bonus against stuck targets on their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的koruku仆从在下一轮对被定身的目标获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a cumulative +2 to the defenses of all koruku servitors until the end of the servitors’ next turn.
ast.target: 为所有koruku仆从的防御等级增加累积+2，直到仆从的下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 damage bonus until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的koruku仆从获得+4伤害加值，直到其下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 在战斗中增加一名koruku仆从。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller adds twice the escalation die (2*@ed) to its saves.
ast.target: koruku陆行杀手的豁免检定获得升级骰两倍（2*@ed）的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the koruku landkiller is hit by an attack, add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 当koruku陆行杀手被攻击命中时，在战斗中增加一名koruku仆从。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can make a *blood-sucking proboscis* attack against the target as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: koruku幼虫可以在本轮作为快速动作对目标进行一次*吸血口器*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 additional damage and the koruku larva can heal 5 hit points.
ast.target: 目标受到5点额外伤害，koruku幼虫可以恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a damaged koruku larva at the start of its turn takes 2d6 acid damage.
ast.target: 在koruku幼虫的回合开始时，任何与受损的koruku幼虫交战的生物受到2d6点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can physically and magically bond with a willing humanoid, or a humanoid it has reduced to 0 hp, and evolve over the course of a day into a koruku symbiont.
ast.target: koruku幼虫可以与一个自愿的人形生物，或一个它已将其生命值降至0的人形生物进行物理和魔法结合，并在一天内进化为koruku共生体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku servitor takes 10 damage and the target gains a random Wild Magic Benefit from the table below.
ast.target: koruku仆从受到10点伤害，目标从下表获得一个随机的狂野魔法增益。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Koruku servitors fade away if they fly too far from their koruku landkiller, but are quick and agile fliers in battle.
ast.target: 如果飞离其koruku陆行杀手太远，koruku仆从会消失，但它们在战斗中是敏捷的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened (normal save ends) and the koruku symbiont can pop free of the target.
ast.target: 目标被削弱（普通豁免结束），koruku共生体可以从目标身上脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 8 ongoing poison damage (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到8点持续毒素伤害（普通豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku symbiont can make an *acid spew* attack as a quick action.
ast.target: koruku共生体可以作为快速动作进行一次*酸液喷吐*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stunned until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被震慑，直到其下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当升级骰为4+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标被阻碍（普通豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lammasu priest can make a righteous ray of faith attack against a different target.
ast.target: lammasu祭司可以对不同目标进行一次*正义信仰射线*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast spells (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标无法施法（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One spell or effect created by the target this battle is canceled (lammasu’s choice).
ast.target: 取消目标在本场战斗中创造的一个法术或效果（由lammasu选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型黑龙每场战斗可使用酸息1d3次，但不能连续两轮使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型蓝龙每场战斗可使用闪电吐息1d6次，但不能连续两轮使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以作为自由动作进行一次*胡言乱语*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在回合开始时作为自由动作，龙可以取消其身上所有效果和状态，包括持续伤害。即使它被阻止采取动作（例如被震慑），它也可以取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a third fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第三次*尖牙、利爪和尾巴*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large red dragon can use fiery breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型红龙每场战斗可使用烈焰吐息1d4次，但不能连续两轮使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 16+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当攻击以此龙为目标时，作为自由动作，它可以迫使攻击者重投该次攻击，并对该次攻击具有16+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of lesser haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the lesser haunting’s attacks and damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每有一群独立的低级幽灵喽啰（每群至少四名喽啰），低级幽灵的攻击和伤害就获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say "nearby".
ast.target: 土巨怪可以看穿各种岩石和土壤一定距离，假设为“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any woven engaged with the target can attack it as a free action.
ast.target: 任何与目标交战的织网者都可以作为自由动作攻击它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich baroness scores a critical hit, the target loses a death save until the end of the battle (effectively, it now dies after failing three death saves, and the effect is cumulative). In addition, the crit range of attacks by the lich against the target expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当巫妖女爵造成重击时，目标失去一次死亡豁免，直到战斗结束（实际上，它现在在三次死亡豁免失败后死亡，且此效果可累积）。此外，巫妖对目标的攻击重击范围扩大，数值等于升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich drops to 0 hit points, it crumbles to dust but does not die. It begins to reform near its phylactery, taking a number of days to regain its full strength equal to its level. If the phylactery has been destroyed, the lich dies when it drops to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 当巫妖的生命值降至0时，它化为尘土但并未死亡。它开始在其命匣附近重塑形体，恢复全部力量所需的天数等于其等级。如果命匣已被摧毁，巫妖在生命值降至0时死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+)
ast.target: 目标被削弱而非眩晕（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is encased in shadows (save ends). While under the effect, it’s weakened and takes 10 ongoing cold damage.
ast.target: 目标被暗影包裹（豁免结束）。在此效果下，它被削弱并受到10点持续寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing fire damage instead of 10.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续火焰伤害，而非10点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 48 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，若目标生命值为48或更低，则其陷入眩晕（攻击-4），且其攻击不加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
