ast.source: While engaged with the lich flower, non-undead and non-plant creatures are dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 当与巫妖花交战时，非亡灵和非植物生物陷入眩晕（攻击-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich flower drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a blood rose or poison dandelion that lacks the black-gray resurgence ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当巫妖花生命值降至0时，它被摧毁，直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它复活为血玫瑰或毒蒲公英，该生物不具备黑灰复苏能力，但除此之外未受损伤且完整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱而非眩晕（硬性豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack would hit the lich prince, the attack misses instead and the lich teleports to a nearby location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击将命中巫妖王子时，该攻击改为未命中，且巫妖以一个自由动作传送到其可见的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，若目标生命值为120或更低，则其陷入眩晕（攻击-4），且其攻击不加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lizardman savage can make a bite attack against the target or another creature engaged with it as a free action.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人狂战士可以对目标或与其交战的另一生物进行一次啃咬攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the lokkris hits with the attack, the crit range for all lokkris against that target expands by 1 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每当洛克里斯用该攻击命中目标时，所有洛克里斯对该目标的暴击范围扩大1，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lokkris are quick darting fliers that move with an angry buzzing sound.
ast.target: 洛克里斯是敏捷的飞行生物，移动时发出愤怒的嗡嗡声。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A lokkris can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 洛克里斯能像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dirt-fisher can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances, but it prefers to attack from within its pre-dug trap-door pit. It usually has a few pits dug nearby if forced to leave its current pit.
ast.target: 土渔夫能以极快的速度短距离掘地，但它更喜欢从预先挖好的陷阱坑中发起攻击。如果被迫离开当前坑洞，它通常会在附近挖几个坑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dirt-fisher deals double damage against creatures engaged with it in its pit.
ast.target: 土渔夫对其坑中与之交战的生物造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 6 extra fire damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到6点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of major haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the major haunting’s attacks and +2 to its damage.
ast.target: 对于战场上每一组独立的大型闹鬼喽啰群（每群至少有四个喽啰），大型闹鬼的攻击获得+1加值，伤害获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮可以对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击骰），此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it is staggered.
ast.target: 每当蝎尾狮使用尾刺齐射攻击时，它受到1d6伤害，如果它处于重伤状态，则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action without taking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮可以对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击骰），此为自由动作，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In addition, the target can’t use the escalation die until it saves.
ast.target: 此外，目标在豁免成功前无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can use musical voice only 1d4 times during the battle, and never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮在整场战斗中只能使用音乐之声1d4次，且不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每当蝎尾狮使用尾刺齐射攻击时，它受到1d6伤害，如果它处于重伤状态，则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fortissimo—Each of the manticore’s allies gains a +2d6 damage bonus with attacks that hit until the end of the battle (non-cumulative).
ast.target: 强音——蝎尾狮的所有盟友在战斗结束前，其命中攻击获得+2d6伤害加值（不可叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Profundo—The manticore’s musical voice attack now deals 40 psychic damage instead of 20 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 低音——蝎尾狮的音乐之声攻击在战斗结束前造成40点心灵伤害，而非20点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Furioso—The target is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: 狂怒——目标陷入困惑而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Largo—The manticore can make a musical voice attack during its next turn as a free action, but with a +3 attack bonus. This free attack won’t trigger another battle music effect.
ast.target: 广板——蝎尾狮可以在其下一回合以一个自由动作进行一次音乐之声攻击，但攻击获得+3加值。这次自由攻击不会触发另一场战斗音乐效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar pulls its target under the soil/ground. The target is stuck, hampered, and takes 5 ongoing damage from suffocation (save ends all)
ast.target: 曼提库玛将其目标拉入土壤/地面下。目标被困、受阻，并因窒息受到5点持续伤害（所有状态豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar can move rapidly through sand, loose soil, or dry eroded earth. It prefers to dig out a wide pit and lie in wait for prey. (See Burrowing.)
ast.target: 曼提库玛能在沙地、松散土壤或干燥侵蚀的土壤中快速移动。它更喜欢挖一个宽阔的坑，然后潜伏等待猎物。（参见掘地。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the mantikumhar uses its serpent sting attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每当曼提库玛使用蛇刺攻击时，它受到1d6伤害，如果它处于重伤状态，则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mantikumhar can burrow into the soil as a move action, concealing itself from attacks. A hunkered mantikumhar gains a +3 bonus to AC and PD, but it can’t use crushing leonine jaws.
ast.target: 曼提库玛可以一个移动动作掘入土壤中，使自己免受攻击。蹲伏的曼提库玛获得+3的AC和PD加值，但它无法使用碎裂狮颚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar’s extensible tail can strike by surprise like a cobra from anywhere in its pit.
ast.target: 曼提库玛可伸展的尾巴能像眼镜蛇一样从其坑中的任何位置出其不意地发起攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The marilith’s crit range with melee attacks expands by a number equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 蛇发女妖的近战攻击暴击范围扩大，数值等于升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered and weakened (hard save ends both, 16+).
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻和虚弱（硬性豁免结束两者，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mutant chuul can make three crushing claws attacks instead of two. If two of the attacks hit the same target, the chuul grabs it.
ast.target: 变异丘尔可以进行三次碎裂爪攻击，而非两次。如果其中两次攻击命中同一目标，丘尔会抓住它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chuul rolls a natural even hit with crushing claws, it deals 120 damage instead of 70.
ast.target: 当丘尔用碎裂爪掷出自然偶数命中时，它造成120点伤害，而非70点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul gains a venom spit attack.
ast.target: 丘尔获得毒液喷吐攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul can make a second venom spit attack against the same group as a free action.
ast.target: 丘尔可以对同一组目标进行第二次毒液喷吐攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mausoleum dragon can make an infused ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 陵寝龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次灌注寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 7 ongoing holy damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到7点持续神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷或负能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 4 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到4点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型黑龙每场战斗可使用酸液吐息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型蓝龙每场战斗可使用闪电吐息1d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll another fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 再进行一次獠牙、利爪与尾击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium red dragon can use fiery breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型红龙每场战斗可使用烈焰吐息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 12+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以龙为目标时，它可以作为一个自由动作迫使攻击者重骰该攻击，并对该攻击具有12+的抗性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a petrifying gaze attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 美杜莎可以对目标发动石化凝视攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a lightning fork attack against a different target as a free action; keep making lightning fork attacks until you run out of targets that have taken damage from lightning fork or roll a natural odd attack.
ast.target: 美杜莎可以对另一个目标发动闪电分叉攻击，此为自由动作；持续发动闪电分叉攻击，直到没有目标受到闪电分叉伤害或掷出自然奇数攻击为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If lightning isn’t working against her target, the medusa noble can take a -2 attack penalty to change the energy type of her ranged attack to fire or thunder.
ast.target: 如果闪电对她的目标无效，美杜莎贵族可以承受-2攻击惩罚，将其远程攻击的能量类型改为火焰或雷鸣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the medusa’s turns, roll a d4. If you roll less than or equal to the escalation die, the medusa can also use petrifying gaze as a quick action once during that turn.
ast.target: 在美杜莎的每回合开始时，掷一个d4。如果你掷出的点数小于或等于升级骰，美杜莎在该回合内也可以使用一次石化凝视，此为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If in her true form, the melusine has limited flight capability, which she uses to effect an escape if sufficiently close to a convenient source of fresh water.
ast.target: 如果处于真实形态，梅柳辛拥有有限的飞行能力，如果足够靠近方便的淡水水源，她会利用此能力逃脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the melusine can change her form to that of any humanoid or fish (the latter usually only if already in water), or turn back into her true form. A successful DC 25 skill check is required to see through the shapechange.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，梅柳辛可以将形态变为任何类人生物或鱼类（后者通常仅在已在水中时），或变回真实形态。需要通过一次成功的DC 25技能检定才能看穿变形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack does double damage, but the xombie takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 此攻击造成双倍伤害，但僵尸自身受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only uses a quick action rather than a standard action.
ast.target: 此攻击仅使用快速动作，而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
As a move action, the minotaur adept teleports somewhere nearby that it can see. Through the earth it looks like burrowing, through air like teleporting, etc.

Limited use: 1d3 times per battle.
ast.target:
作为移动动作，牛头人术士可以传送到它能看到的附近某处。在地下看起来像挖掘，在空中看起来像传送，等等。

\n

有限使用：每场战斗1d3次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The adept gains a bonus to saves equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 术士获得等同于升级骰的豁免加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round the minotaur takes damage, prevent 2d6 of it.
ast.target: 牛头人每回合首次受到伤害时，防止其中2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The moon dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 月龙可以发动一次寒冰吐息攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the full moon is within seven days, the moon dragon’s next ice breath attack this battle will deal double damage.
ast.target: 如果满月在七天之内，月龙在本次战斗中的下一次寒冰吐息攻击将造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: fire when the new moon is within seven days.
ast.target: 当新月在七天之内时，为火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入束缚（通过豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s flesh begins to rot and the ongoing damage increases by +40 (cumulative). Saves granted by special powers don’t increase this damage if they fail, only end of turn failures.
ast.target: 目标的血肉开始腐烂，持续伤害增加+40（累积）。由特殊能力提供的豁免如果失败不会增加此伤害，只有回合结束时的失败才会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already affected by mummy rot, increase the ongoing negative energy damage by 40. If the target isn’t affected by mummy rot already, it takes 40 ongoing negative energy damage and is affected by mummy rot (save ends both)
ast.target: 如果目标已经受到木乃伊腐烂影响，其持续负能量伤害增加40点。如果目标尚未受到木乃伊腐烂影响，它将受到40点持续负能量伤害并受到木乃伊腐烂影响（通过豁免结束两者）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the mummy takes 20 damage or less from a non-fire attack, it takes no damage instead.
ast.target: 当木乃伊受到非火焰攻击造成的20点或更少伤害时，它不受到任何伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mummy has a +4 bonus to all defenses until it takes damage.
ast.target: 木乃伊在受到伤害前，所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action
ast.target: 牛蛙也可以发动一次啃咬攻击，此为自由动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 牛蛙也可以发动一次啃咬攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If smaller than the mutant bullfrog, the target is partially-swallowed, and takes 10 ongoing damage (disengaging or popping free ends).
ast.target: 如果目标体型小于变异牛蛙，目标将被部分吞噬，并受到10点持续伤害（脱离或挣脱结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may add the escalation die to its attack rolls when staggered.
ast.target: 当牛蛙处于濒死状态时，可以将升级骰加入其攻击骰中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The newly-risen ghoul’s scrabbling claws attack deals +2 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 新复活食尸鬼的乱抓攻击对脆弱目标造成+2点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Can only be used when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 仅当升级骰为偶数时才能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time an ochre jelly takes 20 or more damage from a single attack, it splits into two normal-size ochre jellies, each with half the original’s current hit points plus 2d6 hp. Treat the new jellies as undamaged jellies at their new hit point totals without the splitter ability.
ast.target: 当赭色软泥怪首次受到单次攻击造成的20点或更多伤害时，它会分裂成两个正常大小的赭色软泥怪，每个拥有原始软泥怪当前生命值的一半加上2d6点生命值。将新软泥怪视为在其新的生命值总数下未受损的软泥怪，且不具有分裂能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre berserker gains the escalator ability (it adds the escalation die to its attacks) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 狂暴食人魔获得升级者能力（将其升级骰加入攻击骰）直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action, when the ogre berserker fails a save, it can take 3d6 damage to succeed at the save instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当狂暴食人魔豁免失败时，它可以承受3d6点伤害来改为豁免成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion gains a second standard action this turn, but not a third.
ast.target: 食人魔冠军在本回合获得第二个标准动作，但不能获得第三个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the ogre champion take opportunity attacks from it when casting close spells as if they were casting ranged spells.
ast.target: 与食人魔冠军交战的生物在施放近程法术时，会像施放远程法术一样引发其借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion adds the escalation die to the damage it deals with its attacks, hit or miss.
ast.target: 食人魔冠军将其升级骰加入其攻击造成的伤害中，无论命中与否。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre crusader can make a war-curse attack as a free action.
ast.target: 食人魔十字军可以发动一次战争诅咒攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage can cancel one spell or magical effect created by the target.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师可以取消目标创造的一个法术或魔法效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage flies well using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师凭借其卓越心智的纯粹力量飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not engaged, the ogre lightning mage can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 当未交战时，食人魔闪电法师可以作为随意标准动作隐形。它在攻击时显形。当食人魔法师处于濒死状态时，每次使用隐形会受到1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当有限攻击（非随意攻击）以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an ogre mage is damaged, its uncanny flesh heals 20 hit points at the start of the ogre mage’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当食人魔法师受伤时，其异乎寻常的肉体在食人魔法师回合开始时恢复20点生命值。它每场战斗可以再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则该次再生使用不计入五次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ogre mage is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当食人魔法师被造成火焰或酸液伤害的攻击命中时，它失去一次再生使用次数，并且在下一回合无法再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping an ogre mage to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 将食人魔法师的生命值降至0点不会杀死它，只要它还有任何再生使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre mage flies using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔法师凭借其卓越心智的纯粹力量飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre mage is not engaged, it can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 如果食人魔法师未交战，它可以作为随意标准动作隐形。它在攻击时显形。当食人魔法师处于濒死状态时，每次使用隐形会受到1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 25 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use lightning pulse as a free action.
ast.target: 25点伤害，且食人魔法师骑士可以发动一次闪电脉冲，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use voice of thunder as a free action.
ast.target: 20点伤害，且食人魔法师骑士可以发动一次雷霆之声，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 10 damage, and the ogre mage knight can teleport to any nearby location it can see before using magi's lightning chain as a free action.
ast.target: 造成10点伤害，且食人魔巫师骑士可以在使用巫师闪电链作为自由动作前，传送到任何它能看见的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次有限攻击（非随意攻击）以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gain /gmr 1d4 ki at the start of each battle. Spend a point of ki as a free action, once per round, to change the ogre mage knight’s natural attack result by one; a natural 1 could become a 2, a natural 19 could become a natural 20, and so on.
ast.target: 每场战斗开始时获得 /gmr 1d4 气。每轮一次，作为自由动作消耗一点气，将食人魔巫师骑士的自然攻击结果改变1点；自然1可以变为2，自然19可以变为自然20，依此类推。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre minion mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you’re building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，食人魔仆从喽啰算作两个9级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the ogre penitent gains a +4 attack bonus.
ast.target: 当食人魔忏悔者处于踉跄状态时，其获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the ogre fails a save, it takes 1d8 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每次食人魔豁免失败时，它受到1d8点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre penitent rolls a natural 1 or 2 with an attack roll, it can take an extra standard action during its next turn.
ast.target: 如果食人魔忏悔者在攻击骰上掷出自然1或2，它可以在下一回合额外获得一个标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，此能力只需要一个快速动作（每轮一次），而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the ogre takes weapon damage, reduce that damage by 1d8 points.
ast.target: 每当食人魔受到武器伤害时，将该伤害减少1d8点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by orcs expands by 3 unless they are staggered.
ast.target: 除非兽人处于踉跄状态，否则其攻击的重击范围扩大3点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by orc ragers expands by 3 until half the orc rager mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 兽人狂战士的近战攻击重击范围扩大3点，直到半数兽人狂战士被击倒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an orc rager drops to 0 hp, it can make a final attack as a free action. (These extra attacks can come from ragers engaged with a PC.)
ast.target: 当兽人狂战士生命值降至0时，它可以作为自由动作进行一次最终攻击。（这些额外攻击可以来自与玩家角色交战的狂战士。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reroll the attack against a random nearby creature. If the rerolled attack is also a natural 1-5, the orcish archer takes 3 damage from sheer agonized frustration, but it doesn’t get to make another attack.
ast.target: 对一名随机的附近生物重新进行攻击。如果重掷的攻击也是自然1-5，兽人弓箭手会因极度痛苦的挫败感受到3点伤害，但它无法再进行另一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 3+, the orcish archer gains a +3 bonus to melee attacks and melee damage
ast.target: 当升级骰为3+时，兽人弓箭手的近战攻击和近战伤害获得+3加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target and make a big toothy maw attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 食腐兽可以抓取目标，并作为自由动作对其发动一次巨齿利口攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为偶数，则再进行一次撕裂啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One special dybbuk ability triggers as a free action (see below).
ast.target: 一项特殊的恶灵能力作为自由动作触发（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the dybbuk can change its host’s form to that of another humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check. When the dybbuk is driven out of the host body, the body reverts to its original form.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，恶灵可以将其宿主的形态变为另一人形生物，或变回其自身形态。识破此变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。当恶灵被驱逐出宿主身体时，该身体会恢复原状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dybbuk can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 恶灵可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is engaged with the dybbuk at the start of its turn, it takes 20 damage.
ast.target: 当目标在回合开始时与恶灵交战，它受到20点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the dybbuk rolls a natural odd hit or miss with unearthly glare, one special dybbuk ability triggers.
ast.target: 当恶灵在使用超自然凝视时掷出自然奇数命中或未命中，一项特殊的恶灵能力触发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk can hover 6 feet off the ground and make boneless flea-like leaps.
ast.target: 恶灵可以悬浮在离地6英尺的空中，并进行无骨跳蚤般的跳跃。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到5点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标受到5点额外闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beetles fly badly, usually just enough to get back to the worm when they’ve been shaken off from their hiding spots in its segments.
ast.target: 甲虫飞行能力很差，通常仅够在被从其藏身的虫体环节中抖落后飞回蠕虫身边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever one or more parasitic lightning beetles drop to 0 hp, roll a d6. If you roll less than or equal to the number of beetles that were destroyed by that attack, all beetles in the battle stop fighting, using all their actions during their next turn to disengage and fly away.
ast.target: 每当一只或多只寄生闪电甲虫生命值降至0时，掷一个d6。如果你掷出的点数小于或等于被该次攻击摧毁的甲虫数量，则战斗中所有甲虫停止战斗，在下一回合使用所有动作脱离并飞走。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was can make a *disparaging rummage* attack as a free action
ast.target: 任性失败者可以作为自由动作进行一次*轻蔑翻找*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was takes 3d6 damage that ignores its ghostly resistance.
ast.target: 任性失败者受到3d6点伤害，此伤害无视其幽灵抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 当处于非物质状态时，幽灵可以飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Those affected by the face of death must save to end their fear instead of it ending at the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 受死亡面容影响者必须通过豁免才能结束其恐惧状态，而非在其下一回合结束时自动结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 6 ongoing negative energy damage, and the target becomes vulnerable to all attacks by undead creatures until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 6点持续负能量伤害，且目标在战斗结束前对所有亡灵生物的攻击变得易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This phantomaton has been built with sturdier materials than other phantomatons: it has +2 AC and 20 extra hp.
ast.target: 此幻构体由比其他幻构体更坚固的材料制成：它拥有+2护甲等级和20点额外生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phantomaton has a ranged weapon built directly into its body, and can make a *spike-thrower* attack.
ast.target: 幻构体体内内置了一件远程武器，可以进行一次*尖刺投射器*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spider can make a rummage and filch attack against the target as a free action, even if the target isn’t staggered.
ast.target: 蜘蛛可以作为自由动作对目标进行一次翻找窃取攻击，即使目标未处于踉跄状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As long as it didn’t just return from being out of phase, at the start of the phase spider’s turn, roll a d6 to see which of its phase and teleport abilities it can access that turn. The spider doesn’t have to use the available ability and can attack normally, if it wishes.
ast.target: 只要相位蜘蛛上一回合未刚从相位状态返回，在其回合开始时，掷一个d6以确定该回合它可以使用哪些相位和传送能力。蜘蛛不必使用可用能力，如果它愿意，可以正常攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby.
ast.target: 短程传送——作为移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到任何它能看见的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Long teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby or far away.
ast.target: 远程传送——作为移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到任何它能看见的附近或远处位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can make an entangling tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 炼狱魔君可以作为自由动作对另一个不同的目标进行一次缠尾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can use fiendish vigor as a free action.
ast.target: 炼狱魔君可以作为自由动作使用魔性活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a pit fiend, the escalation die does not increase at the start of the next round. Special circumstances and PC powers can still increase it.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对炼狱魔君的攻击时，升级骰在下一轮开始时不会增加。特殊情况和玩家角色能力仍可使其增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the pit fiend can heal 300 hp and roll a save against each ongoing effect on it. It can use fiendish vigor up to five times per battle.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，炼狱魔君可以恢复300点生命值，并对自身每个持续效果进行一次豁免检定。每场战斗中，它最多可使用五次魔性活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Amidst wind and flames, a pit fiend can fly with surprising agility.
ast.target: 在狂风与烈焰之中，炼狱魔君能以惊人的敏捷飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the pit fiend at the start of its turn, that creature takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与炼狱魔君交战，该生物受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for pit-spawn orcs is 17+. Whenever a pit-spawn orc scores a critical hit, each pit-spawn orc mook in the battle gains a +1 cumulative bonus to damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 炼狱兽人子嗣的重击范围为17+。每当一名炼狱兽人子嗣造成重击时，战斗中每名炼狱兽人子嗣喽啰获得+1累积伤害加值，直至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 精灵骑士飞行，但从不离地太远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight can’t be intercepted and doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks by moving.
ast.target: 精灵骑士无法被拦截，且移动时不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a new podling into the battle in a random location.
ast.target: 在随机位置向战场中添加一个新的豆荚幼体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the pixie pod rolls a natural even hit with peripheral summoning, it adds a number of podlings into the battle equal to the escalation die instead of only one.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当精灵豆荚通过外围召唤掷出自然偶数命中时，它会向战场中添加等于升级骰数量的豆荚幼体，而非仅一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Although its podlings occasionally pick up and move it around out of combat, in battle the pixie pod can’t move and is stuck except for its teleport ability.
ast.target: 尽管其豆荚幼体偶尔会在战斗外拾起并移动它，但在战斗中，精灵豆荚无法移动且被固定，除了其传送能力外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a move action, the pixie-pod can teleport to a nearby location. But its control sucks. The teleport goes in a random direction. Roll it using a d8 for direction.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为移动动作，精灵豆荚可以传送至附近位置。但其控制力很差。传送会朝随机方向进行。使用d8骰子来决定方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie pod is normally accompanied by five active podlings that don’t count toward the total when building a battle with the pod. Additional podlings do count, however.
ast.target: 精灵豆荚通常由五个活跃的豆荚幼体陪伴，这些幼体在构建包含豆荚的战斗时不计入总数。然而，额外的豆荚幼体会计入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie warrior can make a madness attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 精灵战士可以对目标进行一次疯狂攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: During battle, pixies fill the air with the light and sound of countless flashy illusions. The effects are disorienting enough that the PCs don’t get to add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 战斗期间，精灵们用无数炫目幻象的光与声音充斥空气。这些效果足以令人迷失方向，以至于玩家角色无法将升级骰加入其攻击中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pixies make flying look like a lot of fun.
ast.target: 精灵们让飞行看起来充满乐趣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t choose to search for the pixie-pod plant until all podlings in the battle are slain.
ast.target: 在战斗中所有豆荚幼体被击杀之前，目标无法选择搜索精灵豆荚植物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The podling that can fly, hovering out of reach and firing arrows.
ast.target: 能够飞行的豆荚幼体，悬停在无法触及的位置并发射箭矢。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the poison dandelion drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a death blossom or lich flower that lacks the red-yellow resurrection ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当毒蒲公英的生命值降至0时，它被摧毁，直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它复活为死亡花苞或巫妖花，缺乏红黄复活能力，但除此之外未受损且完整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The prismatic ogre mage can use prismatic blast as a free action without provoking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 彩虹食人魔巫师可以使用彩虹爆发作为自由动作，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，此能力仅需一个快速动作（每回合一次），而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 50 damage, and the target is confused (save ends).
ast.target: 50点伤害，且目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses a recovery, and the prismatic ogre mage heals 70 hp.
ast.target: 目标失去一次恢复，彩虹食人魔巫师恢复70点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被震慑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed and confused (save ends both). When the target saves, it takes 40 psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标陷入眩晕和困惑（通过豁免两者结束）。当目标通过豁免时，它受到40点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Purple larvae can dig quickly in and out of the skin of the purple worm as if they were burrowing but without needing die rolls to succeed.
ast.target: 紫色幼虫可以在紫色蠕虫的皮肤中快速进出挖掘，如同它们在掘地一样，但无需掷骰成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm takes 10 damage (but it still deals miss damage on a 2-5)
ast.target: 蠕虫受到10点伤害（但它在2-5点时仍造成未命中伤害）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ranged weapon attacks with non-magical weapons or non-magical ammunition against the salamander fail—the missiles simply burn up mid-air.
ast.target: 使用非魔法武器或非魔法弹药对火蜥蜴进行远程武器攻击会失败——投射物会在半空中燃烧殆尽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a rend mind attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以进行一次撕裂心智攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将其形态变为任何类人生物，或变回其自身形态。识破变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每天一次，作为快速动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等于窃取时骰子数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合正常增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is no longer confused it takes 50 psychic damage.
ast.target: 当目标不再困惑时，它受到50点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die advances the rakshasa teleports as a free action to any spot it can see nearby or faraway. If the rakshasa is engaged with a PC, that character’s player can choose to prevent the teleportation at the cost of the escalation die not advancing.
ast.target: 当升级骰推进时，罗刹作为自由动作传送至其可见的附近或远处任何位置。如果罗刹正与一名玩家角色交战，该角色的玩家可以选择以升级骰不推进为代价来阻止传送。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 20 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将其形态变为任何类人生物，或变回其自身形态。识破变形需要通过DC 20的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa isn’t alone—it bought a team of hirelings and hangers-on into the dungeon with it, though they are currently elsewhere. When the escalation die reaches 3+ these allies rush into the fight and act at the start of the round.
ast.target: 罗刹并非孤身一人——它带着一队雇佣兵和随从进入了地牢，尽管他们目前在别处。当升级骰达到3+时，这些盟友冲入战斗并在回合开始时行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a *rend mind* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以进行一次*撕裂心智*攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将其形态变为任何类人生物，或变回其自身形态。识破变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每天一次，作为快速动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等于窃取时骰子数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合正常增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s saves against ongoing damage become hard (16+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标对抗持续伤害的豁免变为困难（16+），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The psychic seduction attack is not expended can be used again this battle.
ast.target: 心灵诱惑攻击未被消耗，可在本场战斗中再次使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The devourer of wizards adds the escalation die to its attacks and damage when it targets a creature that has one or more icon relationship points with the Magic Icon.
ast.target: 当巫师吞噬者针对一个或多个与魔法图标有图标关系点数的生物时，它将升级骰加入其攻击和伤害中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到5点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rat swarms gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks and take only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 鼠群获得+5脱离检定加值，且仅受到借机攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 当战斗中至少有一个生物陷入蹒跚或昏迷时，掘地虫获得等于升级骰的攻击和伤害加值。没有血液的生物（构装体、软泥怪、植物生物等）不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the bumoorah takes damage from an attack, it rolls a save; on a 16+ it can immediately dive beneath the ground, preventing further attacks against it until it surfaces at the start of its next turn. Force attacks and opportunity attacks don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 每当布穆拉受到攻击伤害时，它进行一次豁免；在16+时，它可以立即潜入地下，防止进一步的攻击，直到其下一回合开始时浮出地面。力场攻击和借机攻击不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bumoorah can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances. Bumoorahs are renowned for the dust-spurts and vibrating sound they generate as they shoot through the ground like hungry spears.
ast.target: 布穆拉可以极快地短距离掘地。布穆拉以其在地下疾驰时产生的尘土喷射和振动声而闻名，如同饥饿的长矛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add another ravenous cannibal mook to the mob (it must have been hiding somewhere nearby, or wasn’t really dead when it dropped earlier in the battle).
ast.target: 向群体中添加另一个贪婪的食人族爪牙（它一定藏在附近某处，或者在战斗早期倒下时并未真正死亡）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the damage by +1 for each razor shark mook that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 每有一个剃刀鲨爪牙在本场战斗中倒下，伤害增加+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target and the razor shark each take 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标和剃刀鲨各受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When two or more razor sharks in the same mob are dropped to 0 hp by an attack, as a free action each dropped razor shark attacks one random nearby non-razor shark creature before it dies. That creature takes 1d8 damage.
ast.target: 当同一群体中的两个或更多剃刀鲨被一次攻击降至0生命值时，作为自由动作，每个倒下的剃刀鲨在死亡前攻击一个随机的附近非剃刀鲨生物。该生物受到1d8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This really angry kobold transforms into an undamaged red haze berserker after the attack.
ast.target: 这只极度愤怒的地精在攻击后会变身为一个未受损的红色狂暴狂战士。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 使用此怪物构建战斗时，它仅算作半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 36 hp.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合结束，目标将持续受到掠夺者的*恐惧光环*影响，即使其生命值超过36点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 2d6 bonus damage to the target
ast.target: 对目标造成2d6点额外伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the redcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the redcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 当红帽地精造成重击，或者当桌边的玩家或角色说出脏话时，红帽地精可以作为一个自由动作传送到一个它能看到的附近隐蔽位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiery vanquisher can make a *burning breath* attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 烈焰征服者可以作为一个自由动作对目标进行一次*烈焰吐息*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fiery vanquisher can roll two d20s for its heavy axe attack and use the best result.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，烈焰征服者可以为它的重斧攻击掷两个d20，并取最佳结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the flamewing is forced to land, it rolls 3d20 for its next attack roll and takes the best result.
ast.target: 当焰翼龙被迫降落时，它为下一次攻击骰掷3d20，并取最佳结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flamewing can fly, and fly fast—soaring on wings of flame. However, its turning circle isn’t great and it can’t hover, so in tight quarters it needs to land. Also, its wings are made of fire, and overusing its fireball breath can cause the wings to gutter and fade.
ast.target: 焰翼龙能够飞行，而且飞得很快——凭借火焰之翼翱翔。然而，它的转弯半径不太理想，也无法悬停，因此在狭窄空间内需要降落。此外，它的翅膀由火焰构成，过度使用火球吐息可能导致翅膀闪烁并消退。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle the flamewing is hit by a fire attack, instead of taking the fire damage it heals that many hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，焰翼龙首次被火焰攻击命中时，它不承受火焰伤害，而是恢复等量的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d12 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对它用近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d12点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The queen may be sluggish after eating unsuccessful suitors, laying eggs, or moving across the ice like a rushing avalanche. Roll 2d10 to determine her current initiative.
ast.target: 蜂后可能在吞食失败的求偶者、产卵或像山崩一样在冰面上移动后变得迟缓。掷2d10来决定她当前的先攻值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resurgent phoenix can fly as well or better than anything you’ve seen airborne.
ast.target: 重生凤凰的飞行能力与你见过的任何空中生物一样出色，甚至更好。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in fire ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0；参见下方的浴火重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a river devil minion, you must only attack river devil minions until the end of the battle or until all river devil minion mobs have dropped to 0 hp.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对河魔仆从的攻击时，你必须只攻击河魔仆从，直到战斗结束或所有河魔仆从群体的生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time a target confused by watery words fails its save, it will forget something important. GM’s choice or player’s suggestion!
ast.target: 每次被水语术迷惑的目标豁免失败时，它都会忘记一些重要的事情。由GM选择或玩家建议！

ast.name: description
ast.source: No choice, the target suffers both effects.
ast.target: 没有选择，目标同时承受两种效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, though it can achieve impressive elevation and mobility if need be.
ast.target: 闪光携带者通常悬浮在离地面一两英尺的地方，不过如果需要，它可以达到令人印象深刻的飞行高度和机动性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is now considered to be wearing no armor (the armor is damaged beyond repair; adjust defenses accordingly). If the target’s armor is magical, the target must roll a hard save (16+). On a success, the armor isn’t affected. This effect is permanent until the creature obtains new armor.
ast.target: 目标现在被视为未穿戴护甲（护甲已损坏无法修复；相应调整防御值）。如果目标的护甲是魔法的，目标必须进行一次困难豁免（16+）。成功则护甲不受影响。此效果持续到生物获得新护甲为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当有生物用近战武器击中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行一次豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为需要一次简单豁免（6+）。此效果永久持续。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当有生物用近战武器击中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行一次豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为需要一次简单豁免（6+）。此效果永久持续。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sadsacks are also vulnerable to the type of weapon or attack that ended their lives. Interpret this liberally, GM.
ast.target: 悲惨袋也对导致它们死亡的武器或攻击类型脆弱。GM，请对此进行宽泛解释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gravity does not influence sadsacks unless they are staggered. When they’re staggered, they sink to the ground and stay there.
ast.target: 重力不会影响悲惨袋，除非它们被击溃。当它们被击溃时，它们会沉到地面并待在那里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The priest teleports the target next to one of its nearby allies that it can see, who engages it as a free action. It can’t teleport the target to a location that causes it direct damage (so into a pool of flaming oil is out, but off a ship into the sea is fine).
ast.target: 牧师将目标传送到它能看到的一个附近盟友旁边，该盟友会作为一个自由动作与之交战。它不能将目标传送到会对其造成直接伤害的位置（所以传送到燃烧的油池里不行，但从船上传送到海里是可以的）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each target that was hit takes a -2 penalty (non-cumulative) to all saves until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每个被命中的目标在战斗结束前的所有豁免检定受到-2惩罚（不可叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sahuagin breathe underwater and swim very well.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人能在水下呼吸，并且游泳技术很好。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin mutant adds the escalation die to its attacks until the die is 5+.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人变种者将升级骰加入其攻击，直到该骰为5+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin raider gains a +2 attack bonus while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人掠夺者在被击溃时获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the escalation die by 1, and the target is hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 升级骰增加1，且目标陷入受阻状态（只能进行基础攻击）直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a note of the escalation die when the sahuagin becomes staggered. The sahuagin gains a bonus to its melee attacks and damage equal to the escalation die value for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 当沙华鱼人被击溃时，记下升级骰的值。沙华鱼人在战斗剩余时间内，其近战攻击和伤害获得等于升级骰数值的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The screaming hoardling is dazed and vulnerable until the start of its next turn as it scrambles for its ‘lost treasure’, the weapon it just dropped.
ast.target: 尖叫囤积者陷入目眩和易伤状态，直到其下一回合开始，因为它正在为它刚刚掉落的“失落宝藏”——它的武器——而慌乱寻找。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The seven-headed hydra has all the same abilities as the five-headed hydra, except that the heads that get sprouted are the 8th and 9th and those heads/attacks come with 50 new hit points apiece.
ast.target: 七头九头蛇拥有与五头九头蛇完全相同的能力，只是新长出的头是第8和第9个头，并且这些头/攻击各自附带50点新生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an opportunity attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当借机攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hydra gets a natural even attack roll with a gnashing teeth attack, its next attack that turn (if it has one) is a flame breath attack instead. Note that flame breath attacks don’t lead to other flaming breaths; the hydra has to return to making a gnashing teeth attack first.
ast.target: 当九头蛇用撕咬攻击掷出自然偶数时，它该回合的下一次攻击（如果有的话）将改为火焰吐息攻击。请注意，火焰吐息攻击不会引发其他火焰吐息；九头蛇必须先进行一次撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑状态（困难豁免终止，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When in poorly lit areas of shadow, the dragon adds the escalation die to its attack rolls. Complete darkness or bright daylight negates the ability.
ast.target: 在光线昏暗的阴影区域时，龙将升级骰加入其攻击骰。完全黑暗或明亮的日光会消除此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, natural odd attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. When the escalation die is odd, natural even attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. Attacks that deal holy damage ignore this ability.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，对龙的自然奇数攻击自动未命中。当升级骰为奇数时，对龙的自然偶数攻击自动未命中。造成神圣伤害的攻击忽略此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the current battle is over, the next time this day that the target takes ongoing damage, the shadow mongoose gets to make a *destruction of fate* attack against the target.
ast.target: 当前战斗结束后，当天目标下一次受到持续伤害时，暗影猫鼬可以对目标进行一次*命运毁灭*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can move over any solid surface, slithering like a shadow.
ast.target: 暗影猫鼬可以在任何固体表面上移动，像影子一样滑行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the shadow mongoose doesn’t attack on its turn it can turn into a flat shadow, and cannot be intercepted or attacked it is moving in this form. When it returns to its normal form, it deals double damage with its next attack, hit or miss.
ast.target: 如果暗影猫鼬在其回合内不进行攻击，它可以变成一个扁平的影子，在此形态下移动时无法被拦截或攻击。当它恢复原形时，它的下一次攻击（无论命中与否）将造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: d12 damage to a nearby target not engaged with the shadow mongoose.
ast.target: 对一个未与暗影猫鼬交战的附近目标造成d12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose may become a thing of dark smoke and shadow, flying swiftly through the air or through the smallest cracks.
ast.target: 暗影猫鼬可以变成一团黑暗的烟雾和阴影，快速飞过空中或穿过最小的缝隙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shadow mongoose dies all the aspects that it stole return to their owners. Stolen aspects that have been traded away also return, but slowly. The person who killed the shadow mongoose gains a random aspect chosen by the GM.
ast.target: 当暗影猫鼬死亡时，它偷走的所有特质都会归还给其所有者。已被交易出去的偷窃特质也会归还，但速度较慢。杀死暗影猫鼬的人会获得一个由GM随机选择的特质。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *tenebrous claws* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 作为一个自由动作，进行第二次*幽暗利爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: …and the relationship that the adventurer has with that icon flips from positive to negative or negative to positive. Conflicted relationships are unaffected.
ast.target: …冒险者与该圣徽的关系将从正面翻转为负面，或从负面翻转为正面。矛盾的关系不受影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can change shape, though not mid-battle. Shadow mongooses sometimes join adventuring parties as helpful hirelings, love interests, or local guides to repeatedly steal icon relationships from adventurers.
ast.target: 暗影猫鼬可以改变形态，但无法在战斗中进行。暗影猫鼬有时会作为有用的雇佣兵、爱慕对象或当地向导加入冒险队伍，反复从冒险者身上窃取图标关系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 negative energy damage, and the shadow thief can make a shadow possession attack as a free action (but see group ability).
ast.target: 目标受到20点负能量伤害，暗影窃贼可以作为自由动作进行一次暗影附身攻击（但需参考群体能力）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound leaves teeth in the wound; the target takes 5 ongoing damage, and the hound takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬会在伤口中留下牙齿；目标受到5点持续伤害，猎犬自身受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, a skin devil heals 8 hp. If it doesn’t heal up to its maximum hit points, it loses its ability to heal from this ability until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，皮魔恢复8点生命值。如果它未能恢复至最大生命值，则在战斗结束前失去通过此能力恢复生命值的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull crab has burrowed its tentacles into the target’s flesh; the target takes a –1 penalty to all d20 rolls (save ends). Until the target saves, whenever it moves the skull crab comes with it, and the crab will continue to bite the target.
ast.target: 骷髅蟹已将其触手钻入目标的肉体；目标所有d20检定受到-1减值（通过豁免结束）。在目标通过豁免前，每当它移动时，骷髅蟹都会随之移动，并且螃蟹会继续撕咬目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The penalty to all d20 rolls increases by –1 (first failed save = –2 penalty, etc.)
ast.target: 所有d20检定的减值增加-1（第一次豁免失败 = -2减值，以此类推）

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a creature fails three consecutive saves against the scrabbling tentacles effect, attacks against the skull crab deal half damage to it and half to that creature as the crab burrows deep. The effect lasts until the creature saves.
ast.target: 如果一个生物连续三次未能通过对抗爬行触手效果的豁免，对骷髅蟹的攻击将对其造成一半伤害，另一半伤害由该生物承受，因为螃蟹已钻入深处。此效果持续到该生物通过豁免为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (save ends) from looking into the void within it.
ast.target: 目标因凝视其内部的虚空而陷入束缚状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 extra acid damage and is stuck (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标额外受到3点酸液伤害，并陷入束缚状态（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the slime-skull or stuck from its grasping slime tendrils attack at the start of its turn, it takes 3 acid damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与粘液骷髅交战，或因其抓握粘液触手攻击而陷入束缚状态时，它会受到3点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature is slow. It only moves when the escalation die is odd or 6+.
ast.target: 此生物行动缓慢。它仅在升级骰为奇数或6+时移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A slime-skull can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 粘液骷髅可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is the only creature engaged with the smoke devil, the attack deals 30 poison damage instead.
ast.target: 如果目标是唯一与烟魔交战的生物，则该攻击改为造成30点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils drift and eddy as if blown by an evil wind.
ast.target: 烟魔飘荡盘旋，仿佛被邪恶之风吹动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils have a preternatural ability to get to their chosen victims. Keeping the smoke devil out is a hard, champion-tier challenge (DC 25).
ast.target: 烟魔拥有超乎寻常的能力，能够接近其选定的受害者。将烟魔阻挡在外是一项困难的、冠军级挑战（DC 25）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered from burning eyes and gases in its lungs until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标因眼睛灼烧和肺部气体而陷入受阻状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the snowy owlbear’s next turn, the target is hampered while engaged with the owlbear.
ast.target: 直到雪鸮熊的下一回合结束，目标在与雪鸮熊交战时处于受阻状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The snowy owlbear’s crit range expands by 1 for each owlbear cub that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 雪鸮熊的重击范围每有一只雪鸮熊幼崽在本次战斗中倒下就扩大1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪鸮熊只造成一半伤害，除非它们掷出自然14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Checks to hear a snowy owlbear take a -5 penalty.
ast.target: 察觉雪鸮熊的检定受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gains a +3 bonus on disengage checks, or adds the escalation die, whichever is higher.
ast.target: 脱离检定获得+3加值，或加入升级骰，取两者中较高者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear cub unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪鸮熊幼崽只造成一半伤害，除非它们掷出自然14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster only counts as half a normal monster when building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，此怪物仅计为半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a quick action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰在其回合内已经进行过飞行移动，它可以作为快速动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix teleports to a point nearby or faraway.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰传送到附近或远处的一个点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix flies like the sun unleashed.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰如释放的太阳般飞翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already weakened, it’s also stunned until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标已经处于虚弱状态，它还会陷入昏迷状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays a soul flenser, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it has had flensed away.
ast.target: 当一个生物杀死一个灵魂剥离者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。如果成功，该生物恢复一项曾被剥离的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The soul flenser gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 灵魂剥离者对已被剥离一项或多项能力的生物获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While confused by a soul flenser’s effect, a creature that has had a power flensed away can use and re-use that limited power against their erstwhile allies, if the GM sees how to use the power in a useful way.
ast.target: 当一个生物因灵魂剥离者的效果而陷入困惑状态时，如果它曾被剥离一项能力，它可以对曾经的盟友使用并重复使用该有限能力，前提是GM能找到该能力的有效使用方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is staggered, it is also hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标已陷入踉跄状态，它还会陷入受阻状态（只能进行基础攻击），直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (hard save ends, 16+) instead.
ast.target: 目标改为陷入受阻状态（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A spider mount can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground, and so can its rider.
ast.target: 蜘蛛坐骑可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬，其骑手也是如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A riderless spider mount will eventually run away. At the start of the spider’s turn roll a d4; if you roll less than the escalation die, the mount flees.
ast.target: 无骑手的蜘蛛坐骑最终会逃跑。在蜘蛛的回合开始时掷一个d4；如果你掷出的数字小于升级骰，坐骑就会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is flung 1d6 * 10 feet in a random direction. (If that’s going to put it into a very dangerous place or over a cliff or similar bad spot, it can roll a normal save to catch itself before being thrown and take another 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标被抛向随机方向1d6 * 10英尺。（如果这会将其置于非常危险的地方、悬崖边缘或类似的糟糕位置，它可以进行一次正常豁免，在被抛出前稳住自己，并额外受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，但处于踉跄状态时不可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到2点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast a spell until the end of its next turn or until the splotchcap drops to 0 hp, whichever comes first.
ast.target: 目标无法施法，直到其下一回合结束或斑点帽降至0生命值，以先发生者为准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the splotchcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the splotchcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 当斑点帽造成重击，或者当PC或桌边的玩家说出那个坏词时，斑点帽可以作为自由动作传送到一个它能看到的附近隐蔽位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sporrior can make a spore cloud attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 孢子战士可以在本回合作为快速动作进行一次孢子云攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior gains an extra move action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，孢子战士获得一个额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 孢子战士可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its normal size; but still usable if hampered!
ast.target: 仅在斯普里甘处于正常体型时可用；但即使处于受阻状态仍可使用！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is thrown somewhere faraway but non-harmful (like over a cliff) and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标被抛到远处但无害的地方（比如悬崖另一边），并失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can make an opportunity attack against the spriggan.
ast.target: 目标可以对斯普里甘进行一次借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its larger size.
ast.target: 仅在斯普里甘处于较大体型时可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sprite flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 精灵飞行，但从不离地面太远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the squib swarm at the start of its turn, it takes cold damage equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与鱿鱼群交战时，它受到等同于升级骰的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stalker locks onto its victim with its powerful jaws. If it’s still engaged with the target at the start of its next turn, it can make a *tearing claws* attack.
ast.target: 追踪者用其强有力的下颚锁定受害者。如果它在下一回合开始时仍与目标交战，它可以进行一次*撕裂利爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Despite its size, as an ambush hunter, the stalker is very good at shadowing its prey. Checks to notice it and avoid surprise are ridiculously hard.
ast.target: 尽管体型庞大，作为伏击猎手，追踪者非常擅长尾随猎物。察觉它并避免突袭的检定难度高得离谱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the dungeon heart is staggered, it makes a *mind-erasing blast* attack.
ast.target: 当迷宫之心首次被击晕时，它会发动一次*抹除心智的冲击*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dungeon heart can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 迷宫之心无法发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is odd, the star-mask brain zealot can’t be intercepted, doesn’t suffer opportunity attacks, and takes only half damage from attacks that target AC or PD.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，星面脑狂信徒无法被拦截，不会遭受借机攻击，且仅受到针对AC或PD的攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 psychic damage, but no dazed or confused effect.
ast.target: 20点心灵伤害，但无眩晕或困惑效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask brute can make a throw attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 星面蛮兵可以对目标发动一次投掷攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One dead (or unconscious or otherwise out of the fight) star-mask cultist, dead star-mask cult leader, or dead star-mask brute becomes a living scuttling star-mask mook.
ast.target: 一名死亡（或昏迷或以其他方式退出战斗）的星面教徒、死亡的星面教长或死亡的星面蛮兵会变成一个活生生的爬行星面杂兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask puppet can use oily tentacles to climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 星面傀儡可以使用油腻的触手在天花板和墙壁上攀爬，如同在地面上移动一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/round, as a quick action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 每轮1次，当升级骰为奇数时，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The floating brain’s crit range expands to 11+ for the attack.
ast.target: 浮游脑的暴击范围在此次攻击中扩大至11+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a star-mask floating brain scores a critical hit with psychic pulse, instead of dealing extra damage, the target becomes confused (save ends) instead of hampered.
ast.target: 当星面浮游脑通过心灵脉冲造成暴击时，不造成额外伤害，而是使目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The brain uses telepathic energy to float in the air at about head height.
ast.target: 该大脑使用心灵能量漂浮在大约头部高度的空中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Star-mask floating brains can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 星面浮游脑无法发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of the target’s next turn, it must use its move action to engage the omnipotent brain. It won’t take opportunity attacks to do so, instead trying to disengage.
ast.target: 在目标的下一回合开始时，它必须使用其移动动作与全能脑交战。它不会为此承受借机攻击，而是会尝试脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target saves against the ongoing damage, it must choose one: it makes a basic attack against itself or an ally with its next standard action, OR it becomes weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当目标对持续伤害进行豁免时，它必须选择一项：它用下一个标准动作对自己或盟友进行一次基础攻击，或者它变得虚弱直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每轮2次，作为独立的快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the star-mask omnipotent brain that have 120 hp or fewer can’t target the omnipotent brain with attacks.
ast.target: 与星面全能脑交战且生命值为120或更低的生物无法将全能脑作为攻击目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The omnipotent brain can use a standard action to allow a nearby ally to make an attack as a free action with a +4 attack bonus. If the ally misses it takes 1d8 damage and the brain heals 50 hp.
ast.target: 全能脑可以使用一个标准动作，允许一名附近的盟友作为自由动作发动一次攻击，攻击加值+4。如果该盟友未命中，它受到1d8点伤害，而该大脑恢复50点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stirges fly well. Also, the pitch of their wings is high and thin, allowing a stirge to get very close without tipping off its prey.
ast.target: 蚊蝠飞行能力出色。此外，它们翅膀的音调高而细，使得蚊蝠能够非常接近猎物而不被察觉。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose one effect, and then the stirgeling mob takes 4 damage (killing this creature first).
ast.target: 选择一种效果，然后蚊蝠群受到4点伤害（优先杀死此生物）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage, and 3 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，以及3点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage and is stuck until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，并被缠绕直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They aren’t strong fliers but they are quick and agile.
ast.target: 它们不是强壮的飞行者，但速度快且敏捷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant can also make a stomp attack against a single target as a free action.
ast.target: 石巨人还可以对单个目标发动一次践踏攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant has resist weapons 16+.
ast.target: 石巨人对武器伤害有16+抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 20点伤害，且目标受阻（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 20点伤害，且目标眩晕（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep count of the number of times the storm giant uses its lightning bolt attack during the battle. Add that number to the escalation die to get the current building thunder value.
ast.target: 记录风暴巨人在战斗中使用其闪电束攻击的次数。将该数字加到升级骰上，得到当前的积雷值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A storm giant can use its standard action to walk or run through the air, using move actions to continue. If the storm giant makes a standard action attack, it settles back to the ground below it without falling.
ast.target: 风暴巨人可以使用其标准动作在空中行走或奔跑，并使用移动动作继续。如果风暴巨人发动一次标准动作攻击，它会落回其下方的地面而不会坠落。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The storm giant has resist thunder 16+ and resist lightning 16+.
ast.target: 风暴巨人对雷鸣伤害有16+抗性，对闪电伤害有16+抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a normal save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，当裂魂幽灵穿过像墙壁、王座、门或箱子这样的固体物体时，该物体必须进行一次普通豁免。如果豁免失败，该物体被破坏。强魔法物体在豁免时获得加值，但倾向于糟糕的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm prince gains a +1 bonus to all defenses for each nearby Woven.
ast.target: 蜂群王子每有一名附近的织者，所有防御获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn. It can end the effect by attacking the swarm, or if the swarm drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 目标受阻直到其下一回合结束。它可以通过攻击蜂群来结束此效果，或者如果蜂群生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The serrated maw also deals miss damage the second time it misses with a serrated maw attack each battle.
ast.target: 锯齿巨口在每场战斗中第二次用锯齿巨口攻击未命中时，也会造成未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar avalanche deals damage to itself equal to 1d6 per point on the escalation die 1d6*@ed; damage is not reduced by the all-rock ability.
ast.target: 塔拉纳雪崩对自身造成伤害，伤害值等于1d6乘以升级骰上的点数1d6*@ed；该伤害不被全岩能力减少。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 塔拉纳雪崩已经无可救药了。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9 lightning damage released by the taranar’s all-pervading crystalline components on contact.
ast.target: 目标受到9点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳无处不在的结晶成分在接触时释放。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，当升级骰为3+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the taranar bugler can cause the stones it summons to coalesce into animated conglomerates, whose number is determined by the escalation die +1. The conglomerates take their turns immediately after the bugler when they first appear and each round thereafter.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，塔拉纳号手可以使其召唤的石头凝聚成活化的聚合体，其数量由升级骰+1决定。这些聚合体在首次出现时以及此后每回合，在号手之后立即行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 lightning damage from the electrical discharge caused by the impact of crystal-laced stone feet on their person.
ast.target: 目标受到5点闪电伤害，该伤害由水晶镶嵌的石足撞击其身体时释放的放电造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The coryphée can use this ability only when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 领舞者仅当升级骰为偶数时才能使用此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes the target into the ground, the target is either stuck, hard save ends (if the ground was soft), or takes 20 damage (if the ground was hard).
ast.target: 塔拉纳将目标砸入地面，目标要么被缠绕，要么进行困难豁免结束（如果地面是软的），要么受到20点伤害（如果地面是硬的）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar ends up just pounding the ground, and can make a follow-up seism attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 塔拉纳最终只是猛击地面，并可以作为快速动作发动一次后续的地震攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 7 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到7点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳内置晶体在撞击时释放的电能造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also dazed the target (save ends).
ast.target: 塔拉纳双拳相击，产生一道可怕的闪电，同时使目标眩晕（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到10点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳内置晶体在撞击时释放的电能造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also weakened the target until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 塔拉纳双拳相击，产生一道可怕的闪电，同时使目标虚弱直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque swallows the target immediately (see swallow whole).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克立即吞噬目标（参见整体吞噬）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9d6 extra damage and pops free from the tarrasque as it’s hurled far away.
ast.target: 目标受到9d6点额外伤害，并从塔拉斯克身上挣脱，被远远抛飞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque can swim and breathe underwater (or it holds so much air in its vast lungs that it makes no difference).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克可以游泳并在水下呼吸（或者它巨大的肺部能容纳如此多的空气，以至于这并无区别）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque doesn’t have scales on the inside. It takes a –5 penalty to all defenses against attacks from inside its gullet, though only melee and close attacks can be made in there. The tarrasque’s insides are immune to acid damage, however.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克的内部没有鳞片。它对来自其咽喉内部的攻击，所有防御承受-5减值，不过只有近战和近距离攻击才能在其中进行。然而，塔拉斯克的内部免疫酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标在下个回合结束前处于虚弱状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spell only requires a quick action to use.
ast.target: 此法术只需一个快速动作即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing damage it is also hampered (basic attacks only).
ast.target: 当目标承受持续伤害时，它同时受到阻碍（仅限基础攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 50 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标同时承受50点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against the Final Devil, one of the Final Devil’s nearby allies can make an attack as an interrupt action before your attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对最终恶魔的攻击时，最终恶魔附近的一名盟友可以在你攻击前进行一次中断动作攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays one of the flensed, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it had flensed away.
ast.target: 当一个生物击杀一名被剥皮者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。如果成功，该生物恢复一项曾被剥皮夺走的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Flensed gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 被剥皮者对已被剥皮夺走一项或多项能力的生物，获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second bladed fan attack, and if that is a natural even roll make a third bladed fan attack.
ast.target: 进行第二次刃扇攻击，如果该次攻击为自然偶数命中，则进行第三次刃扇攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is blown back from the Purple Dragon.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon pops free and moves away from the target (blown by the wind of the fan).
ast.target: 紫龙挣脱并远离目标（被扇风击退）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can also choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每场战斗可使用其精神活性吐息2d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。他们也可以选择在精神活性吐息命中或未命中时，使目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束），但这会耗尽其在剩余战斗中的吐息次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: That bladed fan attack? Yeah, that was the Purple Dragon’s wings hidden by an illusion. The Purple Dragon can use the bladed fan attack in this form, but now it is clear that they are using their wings so it is only +9 to attack.
ast.target: 那个刃扇攻击？没错，那是紫龙被幻术隐藏的翅膀。紫龙在此形态下可以使用刃扇攻击，但现在很明显他们是在使用翅膀，因此攻击加值仅为+9。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazzled by light and takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attacks (up to a maximum of -4) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标被光线炫目，攻击承受累积-1减值（最高至-4），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入眩晕和束缚状态（为两种效果和持续伤害进行一次豁免）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 一旦目标通过持续伤害的豁免，如果该次豁免为自然奇数命中，则目标陷入眩晕（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每场战斗可使用其精神活性吐息2d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。他们可以选择在精神活性吐息命中或未命中时，使目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束），但这会耗尽其在剩余战斗中的吐息次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like adventurer tier, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +13 to attack.
ast.target: 与冒险者阶层相同，刃扇攻击在龙形态下转化为翼击，但攻击加值仅为+13。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against weakened or confused they take 100 psychic damage for each failed save against the effect before they successfully passed the save.
ast.target: 一旦目标通过虚弱或困惑的豁免，它在成功通过豁免之前，每次对该效果豁免失败都会受到100点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入虚弱和束缚状态（为两种效果和持续伤害进行一次豁免）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 一旦目标通过持续伤害的豁免，如果该次豁免为自然奇数命中，则目标陷入虚弱（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like the previous tiers, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +17 to attack.
ast.target: 与之前的阶层相同，刃扇攻击在龙形态下转化为翼击，但攻击加值仅为+17。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the Purple Dragon becomes invisible until they next attack. Characters attacking the Purple Dragon ‘blind’ have a 50% miss chance before rolling their attack.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，紫龙变得隐形，直到其下次攻击。角色攻击“失明”状态下的紫龙时，在掷攻击骰前有50%的失手几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon gets one last cunning escape at epic tier, and though their plans are ruined by their defeat they’ll return one last time to exact their vengeance upon the party.
ast.target: 紫龙在史诗阶层获得最后一次狡猾逃脱，尽管他们的计划因失败而破灭，但他们将最后一次返回，向队伍复仇。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rascal’s opportunity attacks deal 3 additional damage.
ast.target: 该无赖的借机攻击造成3点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the rascal rolls a natural even hit with its small tool attack, one nearby ally can roll a save against an effect that can be ended by a save.
ast.target: 当该无赖使用其小型工具攻击掷出自然偶数命中时，附近的一名盟友可以对一个可通过豁免结束的效果进行一次豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing thunder damage.
ast.target: 目标承受20点持续雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a thunder attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次雷鸣攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the thunder bat is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 25 damage.
ast.target: 当雷鸣蝙蝠进入濒死状态时，它必须立即进行一次豁免。如果失败，它失去飞行能力，直到下个回合结束。如果在靠近地面处飞行，它立即着陆。如果在远离地面处飞行，它会重重摔落并受到25点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage except fire damage and melee attacks against AC, which damage it normally.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害具有16+伤害抗性，火焰伤害和针对AC的近战攻击除外，这些伤害对其正常生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant takes 35 or more fire damage from a single attack, it releases all grabbed creatures.
ast.target: 当树人受到单次攻击35点或更多火焰伤害时，它会释放所有被擒抱的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 18+ to all damage except fire damage and melee weapon damage, which damages it normally.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害具有18+伤害抗性，火焰伤害和近战武器伤害除外，这些伤害对其正常生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant titan hits with a titanic rend attack, the target is pulled into a hollow chamber within the treant. While grabbed by the treant this way, the target can’t be the target of its allies’ powers or spells.
ast.target: 当树人泰坦使用泰坦撕裂攻击命中时，目标被拉入树人内部的一个空腔。当以此方式被树人擒抱时，目标不能成为其盟友能力或法术的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Countless smaller branches whip through the air around the treant titan. When a creature engaged with the treant misses it with an attack, that creature takes 12 damage from the whipping branches.
ast.target: 无数较小的树枝在树人泰坦周围的空气中抽打。当一个与树人交战的生物攻击未命中时，该生物受到来自抽打树枝的12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes stunned until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标陷入震慑状态，直到其下个回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 此牛头人造成10点未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby humanoids who saved against trog stench earlier in the battle are affected again by it.
ast.target: 所有在战斗早期通过了穴居人恶臭豁免的附近类人生物再次受到影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from the trog fouler and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标从穴居人污秽者身上挣脱，并失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog fouler drops to 0 hp, while a creature is nearby the fouler, it is subject to trog stench and doesn’t roll saves against the stench at the end of its turn.
ast.target: 直到穴居人污秽者生命值降至0，当一个生物在污秽者附近时，它会受到穴居人恶臭影响，并且在其回合结束时不进行针对恶臭的豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping the trog fouler to 0 hit points isn’t enough. The PCs need to use a magical effect of some sort—or possibly an icon relationship advantage—to end the stench after the fouler has fallen, or move the fight so that it’s no longer nearby the fouler’s corpse.
ast.target: 将穴居人污秽者的生命值降至0还不够。玩家角色需要使用某种魔法效果——或者可能是图标关系优势——来在污秽者倒下后结束恶臭，或者将战斗移至不再靠近污秽者尸体的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is again affected by trog stench if it had saved against the effect.
ast.target: 如果目标曾通过该效果的豁免，则再次受到穴居人恶臭影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog shaman drops to 0 hp, the melee attacks of each trog nearby the shaman deals 6 extra damage to elves and dwarves, and 3 extra damage to half-elves.
ast.target: 直到穴居人萨满生命值降至0，每个穴居人萨满附近的穴居人的近战攻击对精灵和矮人造成6点额外伤害，对半精灵造成3点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: *Grimy spear* now re-applies trog stench on any natural odd roll (other than a natural 1, of course)
ast.target: *肮脏长矛*现在在任何自然奇数命中（当然，自然1除外）时重新施加穴居人恶臭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a troll is damaged, its rubbery flesh heals 10 hit points at the start of the troll’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当巨魔受伤时，其橡胶般的肉体在巨魔回合开始时恢复10点生命值。它每场战斗可再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则该次再生不计入五次使用限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the troll is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当巨魔被一次造成火焰或酸液伤害的攻击命中时，它失去一次再生使用次数，并且在下个回合无法再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping a troll to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 将巨魔的生命值降至0点并不会杀死它，只要它还有任何再生次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the troll’s regeneration dice; the baseline amount a troll regenerates should run about 1/9 of its total hp, but you can go higher to be nasty.
ast.target: 增加巨魔的再生骰子；巨魔再生的基础量应约为其总生命值的1/9，但你可以设定得更高以增加难度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire and acid don’t hurt the troll’s regeneration; lightning does instead.
ast.target: 火焰和酸液不会伤害巨魔的再生能力；闪电则会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If both claw attacks hit the same target, the target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 如果两次爪击都命中同一目标，该目标还会受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twisted soul can make a *weird muttering* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 扭曲的灵魂可以作为一个自由动作进行一次*怪异的喃喃自语*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use the escalation die until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标在下一回合结束前无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard can use earsplitting roar during its first turn of a battle and when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴可以在战斗的第一回合以及升级骰为奇数时使用震耳欲聋的咆哮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard’s *earsplitting roar* attack instead weakened the target until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴的*震耳欲聋的咆哮*攻击改为使目标虚弱，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标被束缚（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each cultist counts as two monsters for the purpose of disengage checks (disengaging from one requires a disengage check of 12+, from two is 14+, three is 16+, etc.).
ast.target: 每个邪教徒在脱离检定中算作两个怪物（脱离一个需要12+的脱离检定，脱离两个需要14+，三个需要16+，以此类推）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This mook has twice as many hit points as other mooks.
ast.target: 这个小兵的生命值是其他小兵的两倍。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 这个小兵的攻击检定有+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this mook dies, it rises immediately on full hit points but is now UNDEAD not HUMANOID.
ast.target: 当这个小兵死亡时，它会立即以满生命值复活，但现在是亡灵而非类人生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire regenerates 1 hp per level at the start of each round indefinitely, but it turns to mist if it drops to 0 hp (see below).
ast.target: 吸血鬼在每轮开始时恢复相当于其等级的生命值，此效果无限持续，但如果其生命值降至0点，则会化为烟雾（见下文）。

ast.name: description
