ast.source: Unless it is slain in a manner appropriate for truly killing vampires in the campaign, a vampire that drops to 0 hp drifts away to return and fight some other day.
ast.target: 除非以战役中真正杀死吸血鬼的适当方式将其击杀，否则生命值降至0点的吸血鬼会飘散离去，改日再战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire spawn can make a fangs attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 吸血鬼衍体可以作为一个自由动作对目标进行一次獠牙攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The venomous snake gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls with this ability against creatures with a lower initiative.
ast.target: 毒蛇使用此能力攻击先攻较低的生物时，攻击检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action during its turn, the venomous snake can take 4 damage to end any ongoing effect on it.
ast.target: 毒蛇可以在其回合内作为一个自由动作承受4点伤害，以结束其身上的任何持续效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its ensorceling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 巨龙恢复其魅惑吐息的使用次数（如果已用尽），并可以在下一回合使用它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void beast spawns a new void beast at full hit points. It follows the same rules for beasts formed by ensorceling breath.
ast.target: 虚空兽会生成一个满生命值的新虚空兽。它遵循由魅惑吐息形成的野兽的相同规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each beast appears next to the dragon, acts as it wishes, and enters the initiative order after the next two creatures have taken their turns. See void beast.
ast.target: 每只野兽出现在巨龙旁边，按其意愿行动，并在接下来的两个生物行动后进入先攻顺序。参见虚空兽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is dazed (save ends). Target takes 10 negative energy damage each time it fails the save.
ast.target: 目标被眩晕（豁免结束）。目标每次豁免失败时受到10点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void phoenix can fly amazingly well for a creature that is turning itself spiritually inside out.
ast.target: 对于一只正在精神上自我颠覆的生物来说，虚空凤凰的飞行能力惊人地出色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击或负能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in void ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简易豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0点；参见下面的虚空重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标受到翼击时额外受到5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标受到爪击时额外受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing fire damage instead of 5.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续火焰伤害，而非5点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 36 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标的生命值为36点或更少时，它会因恐惧而眩晕，并且其攻击不加入升级骰（所有效果豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被困惑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the warped beast’s turns, roll a d6. The warped beast gains the corresponding ability until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在扭曲兽的每回合开始时，掷一个d6。扭曲兽获得相应的能力，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beast has resist damage 11+ to all damage.
ast.target: 该野兽对所有伤害具有11+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the warped beast hits a creature with a tentacle maw attack, the target also takes 5 ongoing psychic damage and a -2 penalty to saves (save ends both).
ast.target: 当扭曲兽用触须之口攻击命中一个生物时，该目标还会受到5点持续心灵伤害，并且豁免检定有-2减值（两者均豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll two madness features instead of one each round (reroll similar results).
ast.target: 每轮掷两个疯狂特征，而非一个（重掷相同结果）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull can’t hop, jump, roll, or fly. It can’t even move its jaw.
ast.target: 这个骷髅不能跳跃、翻滚或飞行。它甚至无法移动下巴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures that have been mystically “keyed” to the skull aren’t affected by its screech attack.
ast.target: 被神秘地“标记”到这个骷髅的生物不受其尖啸攻击的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beast form only, but OK while hampered.
ast.target: 仅限野兽形态，但在受阻时可以使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Humanoid form only, but OK while hampered.
ast.target: 仅限类人形态，但在受阻时可以使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beast form only, and only when the escalation die is 3+.
ast.target: 仅限野兽形态，且仅当升级骰为3+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DC for a truly wild ride is now DC 30.
ast.target: 真正狂野骑行的难度等级现在是30。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the target is also stuck until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如上所述，并且目标还会被束缚，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 该虫群可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the attack the wendigo can teleport somewhere nearby as a free action.
ast.target: 攻击后，温迪戈可以作为一个自由动作传送到附近的某个地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 damage as it bites itself.
ast.target: 目标在咬伤自己时受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target makes a basic attack against its nearest or most vulnerable ally (moving to that target if necessary).
ast.target: 目标对其最近或最脆弱的盟友进行一次基本攻击（如有必要，移动到该目标处）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target attacks the wendigo if it can; otherwise, it does nothing.
ast.target: 目标如果可以，就攻击温迪戈；否则，它什么都不做。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wendigo can walk on the wind. It is not a graceful flyer, but it moves as fast as the wind that carries it. Nearby creatures can see its feet blazing with fire as it runs.
ast.target: 温迪戈可以御风而行。它不是优雅的飞行者，但移动速度与承载它的风一样快。附近的生物可以看到它的脚在奔跑时燃烧着火焰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wendigo is invisible to far away creatures. When the wendigo attacks, if its target couldn’t see it at the start of its turn, the wendigo gains a +2 attack bonus that turn.
ast.target: 温迪戈对远处的生物不可见。当温迪戈攻击时，如果其目标在回合开始时无法看到它，温迪戈在该回合获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werebear is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 20 hp.
ast.target: 当熊人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态时，它恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is 3+, the crit range of this attack expands by 2.
ast.target: 当升级骰为3+时，此攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wereboar takes 8 damage or less from any source, it takes no damage instead.
ast.target: 当野猪人受到来自任何来源的8点或更少伤害时，它改为不受到任何伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wereboar can roll normal saves against effects that aren’t save ends (until end of turn or battle, for example).
ast.target: 野猪人可以对非持续至结束的效果（例如，持续至回合结束或战斗结束）进行正常的豁免检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wereboar is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 18 hp.
ast.target: 当野猪人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态时，它恢复18点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the wereboar can make a smash attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，野猪人可以以自由动作进行一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t make opportunity attacks until the end of the turn (making it easier for the wererat to move away from the target).
ast.target: 目标在回合结束前不能进行借机攻击（这使得鼠人更容易从目标身边移开）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in hybrid form, when the wererat makes an opportunity attack with infected bite, it deals damage equal to its level on a miss.
ast.target: 处于混合形态时，当鼠人使用感染之咬进行借机攻击时，即使未命中，它也会造成等于其等级的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wererat is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 5 hp.
ast.target: 当鼠人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态时，它恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wererat takes no damage and suffers no effects from attacks that miss.
ast.target: 鼠人不会受到未命中攻击的任何伤害或影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the escalation die is 2+ and there are three or more wererats in the battle, a wererat can make a piercing shriek attack as a free action. Usually all the wererats in the battle will do this at the same time.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当升级骰为2+且战场上有三只或更多鼠人时，一只鼠人可以以自由动作进行一次刺耳尖啸攻击。通常战场上所有鼠人会同时进行此动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The weretiger can make a second claws and bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 虎人可以以自由动作进行第二次爪击和撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The weretiger can make a third claws and bite attack as a free action if the escalation die is 3+.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为3+，虎人可以以自由动作进行第三次爪击和撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the weretiger is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 24 hp.
ast.target: 当虎人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态时，它恢复24点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the weretiger hits with a springing strike attack, the target pops free from it and can’t take any more actions that turn unless it succeeds on a save.
ast.target: 当虎人以跃击攻击命中时，目标从其身边弹开，并且除非成功通过豁免检定，否则该回合不能再进行任何动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf attacks a creature that is engaged with one of its allies, the target is vulnerable to that attack.
ast.target: 当狼人攻击一个与其盟友交战的生物时，目标对该攻击易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 6 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态时，它恢复6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf hits with a ravening bite attack, it heals 4 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人以狂暴撕咬攻击命中时，它恢复4点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn as it sees a foe from its past.
ast.target: 目标在下一回合结束前陷入困惑状态，因为它看到了一个来自过去的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a free action, the prophet can try to avoid a non-critical attack that hits it. The attacker must reroll the attack roll with a -4 penalty.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为自由动作，先知可以尝试躲避一次命中它的非重击攻击。攻击者必须以-4惩罚重骰攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a move action, the prophet can teleport to anywhere it can see, or to a location it can’t see but that has the correct geometry and that it has previously prepared (a lair).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为移动动作，先知可以传送至其可见的任何位置，或传送至一个它看不见但具有正确几何形状且已预先准备（如巢穴）的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hatchling can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 幼龙可以以自由动作进行一次寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hatchling scores a critical hit, it prevents the escalation die from increasing at the start of the next round.
ast.target: 当幼龙造成重击时，它会阻止升级骰在下一轮开始时增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a 12+ on the attack roll or the dragon takes half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出12+，否则龙只受到一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The damage for all subsequent cold attacks this battle increases by 1 (to a maximum of 4 extra cold damage).
ast.target: 本次战斗中所有后续寒冷攻击的伤害增加1（最多增加4点额外寒冷伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All whitescale dragonics in the battle can use the escalation die. This monster’s escalating cold ability ends for this battle if it takes fire damage.
ast.target: 战斗中所有白鳞龙裔都可以使用升级骰。如果此怪物受到火焰伤害，其渐进寒冷能力在本次战斗中结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action at the start of the battle, and also once per turn as a quick action, the whitescale blighter breathes a cloud of frost that coats it or a nearby whitescale dragonic in rime. The next attack that hits the rime-covered whitescale this battle deals only half damage.
ast.target: 作为战斗开始时的自由动作，以及每回合一次作为快速动作，白鳞恶徒呼出一团霜雾，覆盖自身或附近的一只白鳞龙裔。本次战斗中，下一次命中被霜覆盖的白鳞生物的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d4 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔在近战攻击未命中时，对目标造成2d4点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rime walker can make a *frost breath* attack against the target as a free action. This use of *frost breath* doesn’t count toward the 1/battle limit.
ast.target: 霜行者可以以自由动作对目标进行一次*霜息*攻击。此次*霜息*的使用不计入每场战斗1次的限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action at the start of the battle, the rime walker breathes a cloud of frost that coats it in rime. The next attack that hits it this battle deals only half damage.
ast.target: 作为战斗开始时的自由动作，霜行者呼出一团霜雾覆盖自身。本次战斗中，下一次命中它的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wibbles waft about. They can fly well enough to ignore most wind, but not strong gale winds.
ast.target: 威布尔斯四处飘荡。它们飞行能力足以忽略大多数风，但无法忽略强阵风。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unless the wight is staggered, the attack also deals 8 ongoing negative energy damage.
ast.target: 除非尸妖处于踉跄状态，否则该攻击还会造成8点持续负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Before the start of the battle, the dryad summons 2d4 awakened trees that fight with it.
ast.target: 战斗开始前，树精召唤2d4棵觉醒树与其并肩作战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dryad can take an extra standard action during its turn when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，树精在其回合内可以额外进行一个标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra damage, and if the target makes an opportunity attack against the polar bear before the start of the bear’s next turn, the bear can make a fang, claw, or tusk attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 目标受到10点额外伤害，并且如果目标在熊的下一回合开始前对北极熊进行借机攻击，熊可以以自由动作对目标进行一次獠牙、爪击或长牙攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 14 extra damage and is stuck (save ends; also ends if the walrus moves)
ast.target: 目标受到14点额外伤害并被束缚（通过豁免结束；如果海象移动也会结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 14 extra damage, or 28 extra damage if another winter wolf is engaged with it.
ast.target: 目标受到14点额外伤害，或者如果另一只冬狼与其交战，则受到28点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dryad gains a +4 bonus to the attack against targets that have consumed natural food or water within the dryad’s domain within the last day.
ast.target: 树精对在过去一天内于其领地内食用过自然食物或水的目标获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 目标同时被削弱（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wraith heals half the damage it deals when it hits with a natural 18+ attack roll.
ast.target: 当幽魂以自然18+的攻击检定命中时，它恢复所造成伤害一半的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wyvern can make a deadly tail stinger attack during its next turn.
ast.target: 飞龙可以在其下一回合进行一次致命的尾刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the wyvern’s ongoing poison damage whenever that damage is dealt.
ast.target: 每当飞龙的持续毒素伤害造成伤害时，将升级骰加到其持续毒素伤害上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xombie spider is under the target’s skin. The target takes 8 damage if it disengages from the spider.
ast.target: 尸化蜘蛛附着在目标皮肤下。若目标脱离蜘蛛，将受到8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/round, as a quick action. In addition, once a creature has saved against the effect, it can’t be targeted by chittering call attacks again this battle.
ast.target: 每轮1次，作为快速动作。此外，一旦某个生物成功对抗了该效果，它在本次战斗中将无法再被尖啸攻击选为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标均受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the zombie beast is first staggered, it makes a thrash attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当僵尸兽首次进入踉跄状态时，它会以自由动作发动一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d4 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标均受到1d4点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a zombie shuffler deals triple damage instead of the normal double damage for a crit.
ast.target: 对僵尸蹒跚者的暴击造成三倍伤害，而非通常的暴击双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标均受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The curse gains an attack bonus equal to the number of Silver Rose zombies in the battle.
ast.target: 该诅咒获得等同于战场上银玫瑰僵尸数量的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each round, one zombie mook in the Silver Rose mob can make a curse attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每轮，银玫瑰暴民中的一名僵尸喽啰可以快速动作发动一次诅咒攻击。

ast.source: When the troll is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当巨魔受到火焰或酸液伤害的攻击时，它会失去一次再生次数，并且在下一回合无法再生。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Dropping a troll to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 如果巨魔还有任何再生次数剩余，将其生命值降至0并不会杀死它。
